chapters.zh: 亚哈死后，摩押背叛以色列。
chapters.en: Then Moab rebelled against Israel after the death of Ahab.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢在撒玛利亚，一日从楼上的栏杆里掉下来，就病了；于是差遣使者说：你们去问以革伦的神巴力西卜，我这病能好不能好。
chapters.en: And Ahaziah fell down through a lattice in his upper chamber that in Samaria, and was sick: and he sent messengers, and said unto them, Go, enquire of Baalzebub the god of Ekron whether I shall recover of this disease.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华的使者对提斯比人以利亚说：你起来，去迎著撒玛利亚王的使者，对他们说：你们去问以革伦神巴力西卜，岂因以色列中没有神么？
chapters.en: But the angel of the LORD said to Elijah the Tishbite, Arise, go up to meet the messengers of the king of Samaria, and say unto them, not because not a God in Israel, ye go to enquire of Baalzebub the god of Ekron?

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华如此说：你必不下你所上的床，必定要死！以利亚就去了。
chapters.en: Now therefore thus saith the LORD, Thou shalt not come down from that bed on which thou art gone up, but shalt surely die. And Elijah departed.

chapters.zh: 使者回来见王，王问他们说：你们为甚么回来呢？
chapters.en: And when the messengers turned back unto him, he said unto them, Why are ye now turned back?

chapters.zh: 使者回答说：有一个人迎著我们来，对我们说：你们回去见差你们来的王，对他说：耶和华如此说，你差人去问以革伦神巴力西卜，岂因以色列中没有神么？所以你必不下所上的床，必定要死。
chapters.en: And they said unto him, There came a man up to meet us, and said unto us, Go, turn again unto the king that sent you, and say unto him, Thus saith the LORD, not because not a God in Israel, thou sendest to enquire of Baalzebub the god of Ekron? therefore thou shalt not come down from that bed on which thou art gone up, but shalt surely die.

chapters.zh: 王问他们说：迎著你们来告诉你们这话的，是怎样的人？
chapters.en: And he said unto them, What manner of man which came up to meet you, and told you these words?

chapters.zh: 回答说：他身穿毛衣，腰束皮带。王说：这必是提斯比人以利亚。
chapters.en: And they answered him, an hairy man, and girt with a girdle of leather about his loins. And he said, It Elijah the Tishbite.

chapters.zh: 于是，王差遣五十夫长，带领五十人去见以利亚，他就上到以利亚那里；以利亚正坐在山顶上。五十夫长对他说：神人哪，王吩咐你下来！
chapters.en: Then the king sent unto him a captain of fifty with his fifty. And he went up to him: and, behold, he sat on the top of an hill. And he spake unto him, Thou man of God, the king hath said, Come down.

chapters.zh: 以利亚回答说：我若是神人，愿火从天上降下来，烧灭你和你那五十人！于是有火从天上降下来，烧灭五十夫长和他那五十人。
chapters.en: And Elijah answered and said to the captain of fifty, If I a man of God, then let fire come down from heaven, and consume thee and thy fifty. And there came down fire from heaven, and consumed him and his fifty.

chapters.zh: 王第二次差遣一个五十夫长，带领五十人去见以利亚。五十夫长对以利亚说：神人哪，王吩咐你快快下来！
chapters.en: Again also he sent unto him another captain of fifty with his fifty. And he answered and said unto him, O man of God, thus hath the king said, Come down quickly.

chapters.zh: 以利亚回答说：我若是神人，愿火从天上降下来，烧灭你和你那五十人！于是神的火从天上降下来，烧灭五十夫长和他那五十人。
chapters.en: And Elijah answered and said unto them, If I a man of God, let fire come down from heaven, and consume thee and thy fifty. And the fire of God came down from heaven, and consumed him and his fifty.

chapters.zh: 王第三次差遣一个五十夫长，带领五十人去。这五十夫长上去，双膝跪在以利亚面前，哀求他说：神人哪，愿我的性命和你这五十个仆人的性命在你眼前看为宝贵！
chapters.en: And he sent again a captain of the third fifty with his fifty. And the third captain of fifty went up, and came and fell on his knees before Elijah, and besought him, and said unto him, O man of God, I pray thee, let my life, and the life of these fifty thy servants, be precious in thy sight.

chapters.zh: 已经有火从天上降下来，烧灭前两次来的五十夫长和他们各自带的五十人；现在愿我的性命在你眼前看为宝贵！
chapters.en: Behold, there came fire down from heaven, and burnt up the two captains of the former fifties with their fifties: therefore let my life now be precious in thy sight.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的使者对以利亚说：你同著他下去，不要怕他！以利亚就起来，同著他下去见王，
chapters.en: And the angel of the LORD said unto Elijah, Go down with him: be not afraid of him. And he arose, and went down with him unto the king.

chapters.zh: 对王说：耶和华如此说：你差人去问以革伦神巴力西卜，岂因以色列中没有神可以求问么？所以你必不下所上的床，必定要死！
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Forasmuch as thou hast sent messengers to enquire of Baalzebub the god of Ekron, not because no God in Israel to enquire of his word? therefore thou shalt not come down off that bed on which thou art gone up, but shalt surely die.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢果然死了，正如耶和华藉以利亚所说的话。因他没有儿子，他兄弟约兰接续他作王，正在犹大王约沙法的儿子约兰第二年。
chapters.en: So he died according to the word of the LORD which Elijah had spoken. And Jehoram reigned in his stead in the second year of Jehoram the son of Jehoshaphat king of Judah; because he had no son.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢其余所行的事都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaziah which he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 耶和华要用旋风接以利亚升天的时候，以利亚与以利沙从吉甲前往。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the LORD would take up Elijah into heaven by a whirlwind, that Elijah went with Elisha from Gilgal.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对以利沙说：耶和华差我往伯特利去，你可以在这里等候。以利沙说：我指著永生的耶和华，又敢在你面前起誓，我必不离开你。于是二人下到伯特利。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto Elisha, Tarry here, I pray thee; for the LORD hath sent me to Bethel. And Elisha said the LORD liveth, and thy soul liveth, I will not leave thee. So they went down to Bethel.

chapters.zh: 住伯特利的先知门徒出来见以利沙，对他说：耶和华今日要接你的师傅离开你，你知道不知道？他说：我知道，你们不要作声。
chapters.en: And the sons of the prophets that at Bethel came forth to Elisha, and said unto him, Knowest thou that the LORD will take away thy master from thy head to day? And he said, Yea, I know ; hold ye your peace.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对以利沙说：耶和华差遣我往耶利哥去，你可以在这里等候。以利沙说：我指著永生的耶和华，又敢在你面前起誓，我必不离开你。于是二人到了耶利哥。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto him, Elisha, tarry here, I pray thee; for the LORD hath sent me to Jericho. And he said, the LORD liveth, and thy soul liveth, I will not leave thee. So they came to Jericho.

chapters.zh: 住耶利哥的先知门徒就近以利沙，对他说：耶和华今日要接你的师傅离开你，你知道不知道？他说：我知道，你们不要作声。
chapters.en: And the sons of the prophets that at Jericho came to Elisha, and said unto him, Knowest thou that the LORD will take away thy master from thy head to day? And he answered, Yea, I know ; hold ye your peace.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对以利沙说：耶和华差遣我往约但河去，你可以在这里等候。以利沙说：我指著永生的耶和华，又敢在你面前起誓，我必不离开你。于是二人一同前往。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto him, Tarry, I pray thee, here; for the LORD hath sent me to Jordan. And he said, the LORD liveth, and thy soul liveth, I will not leave thee. And they two went on.

chapters.zh: 有先知门徒去了五十人，远远地站在他们对面；二人在约但河边站住。
chapters.en: And fifty men of the sons of the prophets went, and stood to view afar off: and they two stood by Jordan.

chapters.zh: 以利亚将自己的外衣卷起来，用以打水，水就左右分开，二人走干地而过。
chapters.en: And Elijah took his mantle, and wrapped together, and smote the waters, and they were divided hither and thither, so that they two went over on dry ground.

chapters.zh: 过去之后，以利亚对以利沙说：我未曾被接去离开你，你要我为你做甚么，只管求我。以利沙说：愿感动你的灵加倍地感动我。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when they were gone over, that Elijah said unto Elisha, Ask what I shall do for thee, before I be taken away from thee. And Elisha said, I pray thee, let a double portion of thy spirit be upon me.

chapters.zh: 以利亚说：你所求的难得。虽然如此，我被接去离开你的时候，你若看见我，就必得著；不然，必得不著了。
chapters.en: And he said, Thou hast asked a hard thing: , if thou see me taken from thee, it shall be so unto thee; but if not, it shall not be .

chapters.zh: 他们正走著说话，忽有火车火马将二人隔开，以利亚就乘旋风升天去了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as they still went on, and talked, that, behold, a chariot of fire, and horses of fire, and parted them both asunder; and Elijah went up by a whirlwind into heaven.

chapters.zh: 以利沙看见，就呼叫说：我父啊！我父啊！以色列的战车马兵啊！以后不再见他了。于是以利沙把自己的衣服撕为两片。
chapters.en: And Elisha saw , and he cried, My father, my father, the chariot of Israel, and the horsemen thereof. And he saw him no more: and he took hold of his own clothes, and rent them in two pieces.

chapters.zh: 他拾起以利亚身上掉下来的外衣，回去站在约但河边。
chapters.en: He took up also the mantle of Elijah that fell from him, and went back, and stood by the bank of Jordan;

chapters.zh: 他用以利亚身上掉下来的外衣打水，说：耶和华 ─ 以利亚的神在哪里呢？打水之后，水也左右分开，以利沙就过来了。
chapters.en: And he took the mantle of Elijah that fell from him, and smote the waters, and said, Where the LORD God of Elijah? and when he also had smitten the waters, they parted hither and thither: and Elisha went over.

chapters.zh: 住耶利哥的先知门徒从对面看见他，就说：感动以利亚的灵感动以利沙了。他们就来迎接他，在他面前俯伏于地，
chapters.en: And when the sons of the prophets which to view at Jericho saw him, they said, The spirit of Elijah doth rest on Elisha. And they came to meet him, and bowed themselves to the ground before him.

chapters.zh: 对他说：仆人们这里有五十个壮士，求你容他们去寻找你师傅，或者耶和华的灵将他提起来，投在某山某谷。以利沙说：你们不必打发人去。
chapters.en: And they said unto him, Behold now, there be with thy servants fifty strong men; let them go, we pray thee, and seek thy master: lest peradventure the Spirit of the LORD hath taken him up, and cast him upon some mountain, or into some valley. And he said, Ye shall not send.

chapters.zh: 他们再三催促他，他难以推辞，就说：你们打发人去罢！他们便打发五十人去，寻找了三天，也没有找著。
chapters.en: And when they urged him till he was ashamed, he said, Send. They sent therefore fifty men; and they sought three days, but found him not.

chapters.zh: 以利沙仍然在耶利哥等候他们回到他那里；他对他们说：我岂没有告诉你们不必去么？
chapters.en: And when they came again to him, (for he tarried at Jericho,) he said unto them, Did I not say unto you, Go not?

chapters.zh: 耶利哥城的人对以利沙说：这城的地势美好，我主看见了；只是水恶劣，土产不熟而落。
chapters.en: And the men of the city said unto Elisha, Behold, I pray thee, the situation of this city pleasant, as my lord seeth: but the water naught, and the ground barren.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：你们拿一个新瓶来，装盐给我；他们就拿来给他。
chapters.en: And he said, Bring me a new cruse, and put salt therein. And they brought to him.

chapters.zh: 他出到水源，将盐倒在水中，说：耶和华如此说：我治好了这水，从此必不再使人死，也不再使地土不生产。
chapters.en: And he went forth unto the spring of the waters, and cast the salt in there, and said, Thus saith the LORD, I have healed these waters; there shall not be from thence any more death or barren .

chapters.zh: 于是那水治好了，直到今日，正如以利沙所说的。
chapters.en: So the waters were healed unto this day, according to the saying of Elisha which he spake.

chapters.zh: 以利沙从那里上伯特利去，正上去的时候，有些童子从城里出来，戏笑他说：秃头的上去罢！秃头的上去罢！
chapters.en: And he went up from thence unto Bethel: and as he was going up by the way, there came forth little children out of the city, and mocked him, and said unto him, Go up, thou bald head; go up, thou bald head.

chapters.zh: 他回头看见，就奉耶和华的名咒诅他们。于是有两个母熊从林中出来，撕裂他们中间四十二个童子。
chapters.en: And he turned back, and looked on them, and cursed them in the name of the LORD. And there came forth two she bears out of the wood, and tare forty and two children of them.

chapters.zh: 以利沙从伯特利上迦密山，又从迦密山回到撒玛利亚。
chapters.en: And he went from thence to mount Carmel, and from thence he returned to Samaria.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约沙法十八年，亚哈的儿子约兰在撒玛利亚登基作了以色列王十二年。
chapters.en: Now Jehoram the son of Ahab began to reign over Israel in Samaria the eighteenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and reigned twelve years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，但不至像他父母所行的，因为除掉他父所造巴力的柱像。
chapters.en: And he wrought evil in the sight of the LORD; but not like his father, and like his mother: for he put away the image of Baal that his father had made.

chapters.zh: 然而，他贴近尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，总不离开。
chapters.en: Nevertheless he cleaved unto the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which made Israel to sin; he departed not therefrom.

chapters.zh: 摩押王米沙牧养许多羊，每年将十万羊羔的毛和十万公绵羊的毛给以色列王进贡。
chapters.en: And Mesha king of Moab was a sheepmaster, and rendered unto the king of Israel an hundred thousand lambs, and an hundred thousand rams, with the wool.

chapters.zh: 亚哈死后，摩押王背叛以色列王。
chapters.en: But it came to pass, when Ahab was dead, that the king of Moab rebelled against the king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那时约兰王出撒玛利亚，数点以色列众人。
chapters.en: And king Jehoram went out of Samaria the same time, and numbered all Israel.

chapters.zh: 前行的时候，差人去见犹大王约沙法，说：摩押王背叛我，你肯同我去攻打摩押么？他说：我肯上去，你我不分彼此，我的民与你的民一样，我的马与你的马一样。
chapters.en: And he went and sent to Jehoshaphat the king of Judah, saying, The king of Moab hath rebelled against me: wilt thou go with me against Moab to battle? And he said, I will go up: I as thou , my people as thy people, my horses as thy horses.

chapters.zh: 约兰说：我们从哪条路上去呢？回答说：从以东旷野的路上去。
chapters.en: And he said, Which way shall we go up? And he answered, The way through the wilderness of Edom.

chapters.zh: 于是，以色列王和犹大王，并以东王，都一同去绕行七日的路程；军队和所带的牲畜没有水喝。
chapters.en: So the king of Israel went, and the king of Judah, and the king of Edom: and they fetched a compass of seven days' journey: and there was no water for the host, and for the cattle that followed them.

chapters.zh: 以色列王说：哀哉！耶和华招聚我们这三王，乃要交在摩押人的手里。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said, Alas! that the LORD hath called these three kings together, to deliver them into the hand of Moab!

chapters.zh: 约沙法说：这里不是有耶和华的先知么？我们可以托他求问耶和华。以色列王的一个臣子回答说：这里有沙法的儿子以利沙，就是从前服事以利亚的 ( 原文作倒水在以利亚手上的 )。
chapters.en: But Jehoshaphat said, not here a prophet of the LORD, that we may enquire of the LORD by him? And one of the king of Israel's servants answered and said, Here Elisha the son of Shaphat, which poured water on the hands of Elijah.

chapters.zh: 约沙法说：他必有耶和华的话。于是以色列王和约沙法，并以东王都下去见他。
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat said, The word of the LORD is with him. So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat and the king of Edom went down to him.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对以色列王说：我与你何干？去问你父亲的先知和你母亲的先知罢！以色列王对他说：不要这样说，耶和华招聚我们这三王，乃要交在摩押人的手里。
chapters.en: And Elisha said unto the king of Israel, What have I to do with thee? get thee to the prophets of thy father, and to the prophets of thy mother. And the king of Israel said unto him, Nay: for the LORD hath called these three kings together, to deliver them into the hand of Moab.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：我指著所事奉永生的万军耶和华起誓，我若不看犹大王约沙法的情面，必不理你，不顾你。
chapters.en: And Elisha said, the LORD of hosts liveth, before whom I stand, surely, were it not that I regard the presence of Jehoshaphat the king of Judah, I would not look toward thee, nor see thee.

chapters.zh: 现在你们给我找一个弹琴的来。弹琴的时候，耶和华的灵 ( 原文作手 ) 就降在以利沙身上。
chapters.en: But now bring me a minstrel. And it came to pass, when the minstrel played, that the hand of the LORD came upon him.

chapters.zh: 他便说：耶和华如此说：你们要在这谷中满处挖沟；
chapters.en: And he said, Thus saith the LORD, Make this valley full of ditches.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华如此说：你们虽不见风，不见雨，这谷必满了水，使你们和牲畜有水喝。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD, Ye shall not see wind, neither shall ye see rain; yet that valley shall be filled with water, that ye may drink, both ye, and your cattle, and your beasts.

chapters.zh: 在耶和华眼中这还算为小事，他也必将摩押人交在你们手中。
chapters.en: And this is a light thing in the sight of the LORD: he will deliver the Moabites also into your hand.

chapters.zh: 你们必攻破一切坚城美邑，砍伐各种佳树，塞住一切水泉，用石头糟踏一切美田。
chapters.en: And ye shall smite every fenced city, and every choice city, and shall fell every good tree, and stop all wells of water, and mar every good piece of land with stones.

chapters.zh: 次日早晨，约在献祭的时候，有水从以东而来，遍地就满了水。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the morning, when the meat offering was offered, that, behold, there came water by the way of Edom, and the country was filled with water.

chapters.zh: 摩押众人听见这三王上来要与他们争战，凡能顶盔贯甲的，无论老少，尽都聚集站在边界上。
chapters.en: And when all the Moabites heard that the kings were come up to fight against them, they gathered all that were able to put on armour, and upward, and stood in the border.

chapters.zh: 次日早晨，日光照在水上，摩押人起来，看见对面水红如血，
chapters.en: And they rose up early in the morning, and the sun shone upon the water, and the Moabites saw the water on the other side red as blood:

chapters.zh: 就说：这是血啊！必是三王互相击杀，俱都灭亡。摩押人哪，我们现在去抢夺财物罢！
chapters.en: And they said, This blood: the kings are surely slain, and they have smitten one another: now therefore, Moab, to the spoil.

chapters.zh: 摩押人到了以色列营，以色列人就起来攻打他们，以致他们在以色列人面前逃跑。以色列人往前追杀摩押人，直杀入摩押的境内，
chapters.en: And when they came to the camp of Israel, the Israelites rose up and smote the Moabites, so that they fled before them: but they went forward smiting the Moabites, even in country.

chapters.zh: 拆毁摩押的城邑，各人抛石填满一切美田，塞住一切水泉，砍伐各种佳树，只剩下吉珥哈列设的石墙；甩石的兵在四围攻打那城。
chapters.en: And they beat down the cities, and on every good piece of land cast every man his stone, and filled it; and they stopped all the wells of water, and felled all the good trees: only in Kirharaseth left they the stones thereof; howbeit the slingers went about , and smote it.

chapters.zh: 摩押王见阵势甚大，难以对敌，就率领七百拿刀的兵，要冲过阵去到以东王那里，却是不能；
chapters.en: And when the king of Moab saw that the battle was too sore for him, he took with him seven hundred men that drew swords, to break through unto the king of Edom: but they could not.

chapters.zh: 便将那应当接续他作王的长子，在城上献为燔祭。以色列人遭遇耶和华的大怒 ( 或作招人痛恨 )，于是三王离开摩押王，各回本国去了。
chapters.en: Then he took his eldest son that should have reigned in his stead, and offered him a burnt offering upon the wall. And there was great indignation against Israel: and they departed from him, and returned to land.

chapters.zh: 有一个先知门徒的妻哀求以利沙说：你仆人 ─ 我丈夫死了，他敬畏耶和华是你所知道的。现在有债主来，要取我两个儿子作奴仆。
chapters.en: Now there cried a certain woman of the wives of the sons of the prophets unto Elisha, saying, Thy servant my husband is dead; and thou knowest that thy servant did fear the LORD: and the creditor is come to take unto him my two sons to be bondmen.

chapters.zh: 以利沙问他说：我可以为你做甚么呢？你告诉我，你家里有甚么？他说：婢女家中除了一瓶油之外，没有甚么。
chapters.en: And Elisha said unto her, What shall I do for thee? tell me, what hast thou in the house? And she said, Thine handmaid hath not any thing in the house, save a pot of oil.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：你去，向你众邻舍借空器皿，不要少借；
chapters.en: Then he said, Go, borrow thee vessels abroad of all thy neighbours, empty vessels; borrow not a few.

chapters.zh: 回到家里，关上门，你和你儿子在里面将油倒在所有的器皿里，倒满了的放在一边。
chapters.en: And when thou art come in, thou shalt shut the door upon thee and upon thy sons, and shalt pour out into all those vessels, and thou shalt set aside that which is full.

chapters.zh: 于是，妇人离开以利沙去了，关上门，自己和儿子在里面；儿子把器皿拿来，他就倒油。
chapters.en: So she went from him, and shut the door upon her and upon her sons, who brought to her; and she poured out.

chapters.zh: 器皿都满了，他对儿子说：再给我拿器皿来。儿子说：再没有器皿了。油就止住了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the vessels were full, that she said unto her son, Bring me yet a vessel. And he said unto her, not a vessel more. And the oil stayed.

chapters.zh: 妇人去告诉神人，神人说：你去卖油还债，所剩的你和你儿子可以靠著度日。
chapters.en: Then she came and told the man of God. And he said, Go, sell the oil, and pay thy debt, and live thou and thy children of the rest.

chapters.zh: 一日，以利沙走到书念，在那里有一个大户的妇人强留他吃饭。此后，以利沙每从那里经过就进去吃饭。
chapters.en: And it fell on a day, that Elisha passed to Shunem, where a great woman; and she constrained him to eat bread. And it was, as oft as he passed by, he turned in thither to eat bread.

chapters.zh: 妇人对丈夫说：我看出那常从我们这里经过的是圣洁的神人。
chapters.en: And she said unto her husband, Behold now, I perceive that this an holy man of God, which passeth by us continually.

chapters.zh: 我们可以为他在墙上盖一间小楼，在其中安放床榻、桌子、椅子、灯台，他来到我们这里，就可以住在其间。
chapters.en: Let us make a little chamber, I pray thee, on the wall; and let us set for him there a bed, and a table, and a stool, and a candlestick: and it shall be, when he cometh to us, that he shall turn in thither.

chapters.zh: 一日，以利沙来到那里，就进了那楼躺卧。
chapters.en: And it fell on a day, that he came thither, and he turned into the chamber, and lay there.

chapters.zh: 以利沙吩咐仆人基哈西说：你叫这书念妇人来。他就把妇人叫了来，妇人站在以利沙面前。
chapters.en: And he said to Gehazi his servant, Call this Shunammite. And when he had called her, she stood before him.

chapters.zh: 以利沙吩咐仆人说：你对他说：你既为我们费了许多心思，可以为你做甚么呢？你向王或元帅有所求的没有？他回答说：我在我本乡安居无事。
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Say now unto her, Behold, thou hast been careful for us with all this care; what to be done for thee? wouldest thou be spoken for to the king, or to the captain of the host? And she answered, I dwell among mine own people.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对仆人说：究竟当为他做甚么呢？基哈西说：他没有儿子，他丈夫也老了。
chapters.en: And he said, What then to be done for her? And Gehazi answered, Verily she hath no child, and her husband is old.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：再叫他来。于是叫了他来，他就站在门口。
chapters.en: And he said, Call her. And when he had called her, she stood in the door.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：明年到这时候，你必抱一个儿子。他说：神人，我主啊，不要那样欺哄婢女。
chapters.en: And he said, About this season, according to the time of life, thou shalt embrace a son. And she said, Nay, my lord, man of God, do not lie unto thine handmaid.

chapters.zh: 妇人果然怀孕，到了那时候，生了一个儿子，正如以利沙所说的。
chapters.en: And the woman conceived, and bare a son at that season that Elisha had said unto her, according to the time of life.

chapters.zh: 孩子渐渐长大，一日到他父亲和收割的人那里，
chapters.en: And when the child was grown, it fell on a day, that he went out to his father to the reapers.

chapters.zh: 他对父亲说：我的头啊，我的头啊！他父亲对仆人说：把他抱到他母亲那里。
chapters.en: And he said unto his father, My head, my head. And he said to a lad, Carry him to his mother.

chapters.zh: 仆人抱去，交给他母亲；孩子坐在母亲的膝上，到晌午就死了。
chapters.en: And when he had taken him, and brought him to his mother, he sat on her knees till noon, and died.

chapters.zh: 他母亲抱他上了楼，将他放在神人的床上，关上门出来，
chapters.en: And she went up, and laid him on the bed of the man of God, and shut upon him, and went out.

chapters.zh: 呼叫他丈夫说：你叫一个仆人给我牵一匹驴来，我要快快地去见神人，就回来。
chapters.en: And she called unto her husband, and said, Send me, I pray thee, one of the young men, and one of the asses, that I may run to the man of God, and come again.

chapters.zh: 丈夫说：今日不是月朔，也不是安息日，你为何要去见他呢？妇人说：平安无事。
chapters.en: And he said, Wherefore wilt thou go to him to day? neither new moon, nor sabbath. And she said, well.

chapters.zh: 于是备上驴，对仆人说：你快快赶著走，我若不吩咐你，就不要迟慢。
chapters.en: Then she saddled an ass, and said to her servant, Drive, and go forward; slack not riding for me, except I bid thee.

chapters.zh: 妇人就往迦密山去见神人。神人远远地看见他，对仆人基哈西说：看哪，书念的妇人来了！
chapters.en: So she went and came unto the man of God to mount Carmel. And it came to pass, when the man of God saw her afar off, that he said to Gehazi his servant, Behold, that Shunammite:

chapters.zh: 你跑去迎接他，问他说：你平安么？你丈夫平安么？孩子平安么？他说：平安。
chapters.en: Run now, I pray thee, to meet her, and say unto her, well with thee? well with thy husband? well with the child? And she answered, well.

chapters.zh: 妇人上了山，到神人那里，就抱住神人的脚。基哈西前来要推开他，神人说：由他罢！因为他心里愁苦，耶和华向我隐瞒，没有指示我。
chapters.en: And when she came to the man of God to the hill, she caught him by the feet: but Gehazi came near to thrust her away. And the man of God said, Let her alone; for her soul vexed within her: and the LORD hath hid from me, and hath not told me.

chapters.zh: 妇人说：我何尝向我主求过儿子呢？我岂没有说过，不要欺哄我么？
chapters.en: Then she said, Did I desire a son of my lord? did I not say, Do not deceive me?

chapters.zh: 以利沙吩咐基哈西说：你束上腰，手拿我的杖前去；若遇见人，不要向他问安；人若向你问安，也不要回答；要把我的杖放在孩子脸上。
chapters.en: Then he said to Gehazi, Gird up thy loins, and take my staff in thine hand, and go thy way: if thou meet any man, salute him not; and if any salute thee, answer him not again: and lay my staff upon the face of the child.

chapters.zh: 孩子的母亲说：我指著永生的耶和华，又敢在你面前起誓，我必不离开你。于是以利沙起身，随著他去了。
chapters.en: And the mother of the child said, the LORD liveth, and thy soul liveth, I will not leave thee. And he arose, and followed her.

chapters.zh: 基哈西先去，把杖放在孩子脸上，却没有声音，也没有动静。基哈西就迎著以利沙回来，告诉他说：孩子还没有醒过来。
chapters.en: And Gehazi passed on before them, and laid the staff upon the face of the child; but neither voice, nor hearing. Wherefore he went again to meet him, and told him, saying, The child is not awaked.

chapters.zh: 以利沙来到，进了屋子，看见孩子死了，放在自己的床上。
chapters.en: And when Elisha was come into the house, behold, the child was dead, laid upon his bed.

chapters.zh: 他就关上门，只有自己和孩子在里面，他便祈祷耶和华，
chapters.en: He went in therefore, and shut the door upon them twain, and prayed unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 上床伏在孩子身上，口对口，眼对眼，手对手；既伏在孩子身上，孩子的身体就渐渐温和了。
chapters.en: And he went up, and lay upon the child, and put his mouth upon his mouth, and his eyes upon his eyes, and his hands upon his hands: and he stretched himself upon the child; and the flesh of the child waxed warm.

chapters.zh: 然后他下来，在屋里来往走了一趟，又上去伏在孩子身上，孩子打了七个喷嚏，就睁开眼睛了。
chapters.en: Then he returned, and walked in the house to and fro; and went up, and stretched himself upon him: and the child sneezed seven times, and the child opened his eyes.

chapters.zh: 以利沙叫基哈西说：你叫这书念妇人来；于是叫了他来。以利沙说：将你儿子抱起来。
chapters.en: And he called Gehazi, and said, Call this Shunammite. So he called her. And when she was come in unto him, he said, Take up thy son.

chapters.zh: 妇人就进来，在以利沙脚前俯伏于地，抱起他儿子出去了。
chapters.en: Then she went in, and fell at his feet, and bowed herself to the ground, and took up her son, and went out.

chapters.zh: 以利沙又来到吉甲，那地正有饥荒。先知门徒坐在他面前，他吩咐仆人说：你将大锅放在火上，给先知门徒熬汤。
chapters.en: And Elisha came again to Gilgal: and a dearth in the land; and the sons of the prophets sitting before him: and he said unto his servant, Set on the great pot, and seethe pottage for the sons of the prophets.

chapters.zh: 有一个人去到田野掐菜，遇见一棵野瓜籐，就摘了一兜野瓜回来，切了搁在熬汤的锅中，因为他们不知道是甚么东西；
chapters.en: And one went out into the field to gather herbs, and found a wild vine, and gathered thereof wild gourds his lap full, and came and shred into the pot of pottage: for they knew not.

chapters.zh: 倒出来给众人吃，吃的时候，都喊叫说：神人哪，锅中有致死的毒物！所以众人不能吃了。
chapters.en: So they poured out for the men to eat. And it came to pass, as they were eating of the pottage, that they cried out, and said, O man of God, death in the pot. And they could not eat .

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：拿点面来，就把面撒在锅中，说：倒出来，给众人吃罢！锅中就没有毒了。
chapters.en: But he said, Then bring meal. And he cast into the pot; and he said, Pour out for the people, that they may eat. And there was no harm in the pot.

chapters.zh: 有一个人从巴力沙利沙来，带著初熟大麦做的饼二十个，并新穗子，装在口袋里送给神人。神人说：把这些给众人吃。
chapters.en: And there came a man from Baalshalisha, and brought the man of God bread of the firstfruits, twenty loaves of barley, and full ears of corn in the husk thereof. And he said, Give unto the people, that they may eat.

chapters.zh: 仆人说：这一点岂可摆给一百人吃呢？以利沙说：你只管给众人吃罢！因为耶和华如此说，众人必吃了，还剩下。
chapters.en: And his servitor said, What, should I set this before an hundred men? He said again, Give the people, that they may eat: for thus saith the LORD, They shall eat, and shall leave .

chapters.zh: 仆人就摆在众人面前，他们吃了，果然还剩下，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: So he set before them, and they did eat, and left , according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王的元帅乃缦在他主人面前为尊为大，因耶和华曾藉他使亚兰人得胜；他又是大能的勇士，只是长了大痲疯。
chapters.en: Now Naaman, captain of the host of the king of Syria, was a great man with his master, and honourable, because by him the LORD had given deliverance unto Syria: he was also a mighty man in valour, a leper.

chapters.zh: 先前亚兰人成群地出去，从以色列国掳了一个小女子，这女子就服事乃缦的妻。
chapters.en: And the Syrians had gone out by companies, and had brought away captive out of the land of Israel a little maid; and she waited on Naaman's wife.

chapters.zh: 他对主母说：巴不得我主人去见撒玛利亚的先知，必能治好他的大痲疯。
chapters.en: And she said unto her mistress, Would God my lord with the prophet that in Samaria! for he would recover him of his leprosy.

chapters.zh: 乃缦进去，告诉他主人说，以色列国的女子如此如此说。
chapters.en: And went in, and told his lord, saying, Thus and thus said the maid that of the land of Israel.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王说：你可以去，我也达信于以色列王。于是乃缦带银子十他连得，金子六千舍客勒，衣裳十套，就去了；
chapters.en: And the king of Syria said, Go to, go, and I will send a letter unto the king of Israel. And he departed, and took with him ten talents of silver, and six thousand of gold, and ten changes of raiment.

chapters.zh: 且带信给以色列王，信上说：我打发臣仆乃缦去见你，你接到这信，就要治好他的大痲疯。
chapters.en: And he brought the letter to the king of Israel, saying, Now when this letter is come unto thee, behold, I have sent Naaman my servant to thee, that thou mayest recover him of his leprosy.

chapters.zh: 以色列王看了信就撕裂衣服，说：我岂是神，能使人死使人活呢？这人竟打发人来，叫我治好他的大痲疯。你们看一看，这人何以寻隙攻击我呢？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the king of Israel had read the letter, that he rent his clothes, and said, I God, to kill and to make alive, that this man doth send unto me to recover a man of his leprosy? wherefore consider, I pray you, and see how he seeketh a quarrel against me.

chapters.zh: 神人以利沙听见以色列王撕裂衣服，就打发人去见王，说：你为甚么撕了衣服呢？可使那人到我这里来，他就知道以色列中有先知了。
chapters.en: And it was , when Elisha the man of God had heard that the king of Israel had rent his clothes, that he sent to the king, saying, Wherefore hast thou rent thy clothes? let him come now to me, and he shall know that there is a prophet in Israel.

chapters.zh: 于是，乃缦带著车马到了以利沙的家，站在门前。
chapters.en: So Naaman came with his horses and with his chariot, and stood at the door of the house of Elisha.

chapters.zh: 以利沙打发一个使者，对乃缦说：你去在约但河中沐浴七回，你的肉就必复原，而得洁净。
chapters.en: And Elisha sent a messenger unto him, saying, Go and wash in Jordan seven times, and thy flesh shall come again to thee, and thou shalt be clean.

chapters.zh: 乃缦却发怒走了，说：我想他必定出来见我，站著求告耶和华 ─ 他神的名，在患处以上摇手，治好这大痲疯。
chapters.en: But Naaman was wroth, and went away, and said, Behold, I thought, He will surely come out to me, and stand, and call on the name of the LORD his God, and strike his hand over the place, and recover the leper.

chapters.zh: 大马色的河亚罢拿和法珥法岂不比以色列的一切水更好么？我在那里沐浴不得洁净么？于是气忿忿地转身去了。
chapters.en: not Abana and Pharpar, rivers of Damascus, better than all the waters of Israel? may I not wash in them, and be clean? So he turned and went away in a rage.

chapters.zh: 他的仆人进前来，对他说：我父啊，先知若吩咐你做一件大事，你岂不做么？何况说你去沐浴而得洁净呢？
chapters.en: And his servants came near, and spake unto him, and said, My father, the prophet had bid thee great thing, wouldest thou not have done ? how much rather then, when he saith to thee, Wash, and be clean?

chapters.zh: 于是乃缦下去，照著神人的话，在约但河里沐浴七回；他的肉复原，好像小孩子的肉，他就洁净了。
chapters.en: Then went he down, and dipped himself seven times in Jordan, according to the saying of the man of God: and his flesh came again like unto the flesh of a little child, and he was clean.

chapters.zh: 乃缦带著一切跟随他的人，回到神人那里，站在他面前，说：如今我知道，除了以色列之外，普天下没有神。现在求你收点仆人的礼物。
chapters.en: And he returned to the man of God, he and all his company, and came, and stood before him: and he said, Behold, now I know that no God in all the earth, but in Israel: now therefore, I pray thee, take a blessing of thy servant.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：我指著所事奉永生的耶和华起誓，我必不受。乃缦再三地求他，他却不受。
chapters.en: But he said, the LORD liveth, before whom I stand, I will receive none. And he urged him to take ; but he refused.

chapters.zh: 乃缦说：你若不肯受，请将两骡子驮的土赐给仆人。从今以后，仆人必不再将燔祭或平安祭献与别神，只献给耶和华。
chapters.en: And Naaman said, Shall there not then, I pray thee, be given to thy servant two mules' burden of earth? for thy servant will henceforth offer neither burnt offering nor sacrifice unto other gods, but unto the LORD.

chapters.zh: 惟有一件事，愿耶和华饶恕你仆人：我主人进临门庙叩拜的时候，我用手搀他在临门庙，我也屈身。我在临门庙屈身的这事，愿耶和华饶恕我。
chapters.en: In this thing the LORD pardon thy servant, when my master goeth into the house of Rimmon to worship there, and he leaneth on my hand, and I bow myself in the house of Rimmon: when I bow down myself in the house of Rimmon, the LORD pardon thy servant in this thing.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对他说：你可以平平安安地回去！乃缦就离开他去了；走了不远，
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Go in peace. So he departed from him a little way.

chapters.zh: 神人以利沙的仆人基哈西心里说：我主人不愿从这亚兰人乃缦手里受他带来的礼物，我指著永生的耶和华起誓，我必跑去追上他，向他要些。
chapters.en: But Gehazi, the servant of Elisha the man of God, said, Behold, my master hath spared Naaman this Syrian, in not receiving at his hands that which he brought: but, the LORD liveth, I will run after him, and take somewhat of him.

chapters.zh: 于是基哈西追赶乃缦。乃缦看见有人追赶，就急忙下车迎著他，说：都平安么？
chapters.en: So Gehazi followed after Naaman. And when Naaman saw running after him, he lighted down from the chariot to meet him, and said, all well?

chapters.zh: 说：都平安。我主人打发我来说：刚才有两个少年人，是先知门徒，从以法莲山地来见我，请你赐他们一他连得银子，两套衣裳。
chapters.en: And he said, All well. My master hath sent me, saying, Behold, even now there be come to me from mount Ephraim two young men of the sons of the prophets: give them, I pray thee, a talent of silver, and two changes of garments.

chapters.zh: 乃缦说：请受二他连得；再三地请受，便将二他连得银子装在两个口袋里，又将两套衣裳交给两个仆人；他们就在基哈西前头抬著走。
chapters.en: And Naaman said, Be content, take two talents. And he urged him, and bound two talents of silver in two bags, with two changes of garments, and laid upon two of his servants; and they bare before him.

chapters.zh: 到了山冈，基哈西从他们手中接过来，放在屋里，打发他们回去。
chapters.en: And when he came to the tower, he took from their hand, and bestowed in the house: and he let the men go, and they departed.

chapters.zh: 基哈西进去，站在他主人面前。以利沙问他说：基哈西你从哪里来？回答说：仆人没有往哪里去。
chapters.en: But he went in, and stood before his master. And Elisha said unto him, Whence , Gehazi? And he said, Thy servant went no whither.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对他说：那人下车转回迎你的时候，我的心岂没有去呢？这岂是受银子、衣裳、买橄榄园、葡萄园、牛羊、仆婢的时候呢？
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Went not mine heart , when the man turned again from his chariot to meet thee? a time to receive money, and to receive garments, and oliveyards, and vineyards, and sheep, and oxen, and menservants, and maidservants?

chapters.zh: 因此，乃缦的大痲疯必沾染你和你的后裔，直到永远。基哈西从以利沙面前退出去，就长了大痲疯，像雪那样白。
chapters.en: The leprosy therefore of Naaman shall cleave unto thee, and unto thy seed for ever. And he went out from his presence a leper as snow.

chapters.zh: 先知门徒对以利沙说：看哪，我们同你所住的地方过于窄小，
chapters.en: And the sons of the prophets said unto Elisha, Behold now, the place where we dwell with thee is too strait for us.

chapters.zh: 求你容我们往约但河去，各人从那里取一根木料建造房屋居住。他说：你们去罢！
chapters.en: Let us go, we pray thee, unto Jordan, and take thence every man a beam, and let us make us a place there, where we may dwell. And he answered, Go ye.

chapters.zh: 有一人说：求你与仆人同去。回答说：我可以去。
chapters.en: And one said, Be content, I pray thee, and go with thy servants. And he answered, I will go.

chapters.zh: 于是以利沙与他们同去。到了约但河，就砍伐树木。
chapters.en: So he went with them. And when they came to Jordan, they cut down wood.

chapters.zh: 有一人砍树的时候，斧头掉在水里，他就呼叫说：哀哉！我主啊，这斧子是借的。
chapters.en: But as one was felling a beam, the axe head fell into the water: and he cried, and said, Alas, master! for it was borrowed.

chapters.zh: 神人问说：掉在哪里了？他将那地方指给以利沙看。以利沙砍了一根木头，抛在水里，斧头就漂上来了。
chapters.en: And the man of God said, Where fell it? And he shewed him the place. And he cut down a stick, and cast in thither; and the iron did swim.

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：拿起来罢！那人就伸手拿起来了。
chapters.en: Therefore said he, Take up to thee. And he put out his hand, and took it.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王与以色列人争战，和他的臣仆商议说：我要在某处某处安营。
chapters.en: Then the king of Syria warred against Israel, and took counsel with his servants, saying, In such and such a place my camp.

chapters.zh: 神人打发人去见以色列王，说：你要谨慎，不要从某处经过，因为亚兰人从那里下来了。
chapters.en: And the man of God sent unto the king of Israel, saying, Beware that thou pass not such a place; for thither the Syrians are come down.

chapters.zh: 以色列王差人去窥探神人所告诉所警戒他去的地方，就防备未受其害，不止一两次。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel sent to the place which the man of God told him and warned him of, and saved himself there, not once nor twice.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王因这事心里惊疑，召了臣仆来，对他们说：我们这里有谁帮助以色列王，你们不指给我么？
chapters.en: Therefore the heart of the king of Syria was sore troubled for this thing; and he called his servants, and said unto them, Will ye not shew me which of us for the king of Israel?

chapters.zh: 有一个臣仆说：我主，我王！无人帮助他，只有以色列中的先知以利沙，将王在卧房所说的话告诉以色列王了。
chapters.en: And one of his servants said, None, my lord, O king: but Elisha, the prophet that in Israel, telleth the king of Israel the words that thou speakest in thy bedchamber.

chapters.zh: 王说：你们去探他在哪里，我好打发人去捉拿他。有人告诉王说：他在多坍。
chapters.en: And he said, Go and spy where he , that I may send and fetch him. And it was told him, saying, Behold, in Dothan.

chapters.zh: 王就打发车马和大军往那里去，夜间到了，围困那城。
chapters.en: Therefore sent he thither horses, and chariots, and a great host: and they came by night, and compassed the city about.

chapters.zh: 神人的仆人清早起来出去，看见车马军兵围困了城。仆人对神人说：哀哉！我主啊，我们怎样行才好呢？
chapters.en: And when the servant of the man of God was risen early, and gone forth, behold, an host compassed the city both with horses and chariots. And his servant said unto him, Alas, my master! how shall we do?

chapters.zh: 神人说：不要惧怕！与我们同在的比与他们同在的更多。
chapters.en: And he answered, Fear not: for they that with us more than they that with them.

chapters.zh: 以利沙祷告说：耶和华啊，求你开这少年人的眼目，使他能看见。耶和华开他的眼目，他就看见满山有火车火马围绕以利沙。
chapters.en: And Elisha prayed, and said, LORD, I pray thee, open his eyes, that he may see. And the LORD opened the eyes of the young man; and he saw: and, behold, the mountain full of horses and chariots of fire round about Elisha.

chapters.zh: 敌人下到以利沙那里，以利沙祷告耶和华说：求你使这些人的眼目昏迷。耶和华就照以利沙的话，使他们的眼目昏迷。
chapters.en: And when they came down to him, Elisha prayed unto the LORD, and said, Smite this people, I pray thee, with blindness. And he smote them with blindness according to the word of Elisha.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对他们说：这不是那道，也不是那城；你们跟我去，我必领你们到所寻找的人那里。于是领他们到了撒玛利亚。
chapters.en: And Elisha said unto them, This not the way, neither this the city: follow me, and I will bring you to the man whom ye seek. But he led them to Samaria.

chapters.zh: 他们进了撒玛利亚，以利沙祷告说：耶和华啊，求你开这些人的眼目，使他们能看见。耶和华开他们的眼目，他们就看见了，不料，是在撒玛利亚的城中。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when they were come into Samaria, that Elisha said, LORD, open the eyes of these , that they may see. And the LORD opened their eyes, and they saw; and, behold, in the midst of Samaria.

chapters.zh: 以色列王见了他们，就问以利沙说：我父啊，我可以击杀他们么？
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said unto Elisha, when he saw them, My father, shall I smite ? shall I smite ?

chapters.zh: 回答说：不可击杀他们！就是你用刀用弓掳来的，岂可击杀他们么 ( 或作也不可击杀，何况这些人呢 )？当在他们面前设摆饮食，使他们吃喝回到他们的主人那里。
chapters.en: And he answered, Thou shalt not smite : wouldest thou smite those whom thou hast taken captive with thy sword and with thy bow? set bread and water before them, that they may eat and drink, and go to their master.

chapters.zh: 王就为他们预备了许多食物；他们吃喝完了，打发他们回到他们主人那里。从此，亚兰军不再犯以色列境了。
chapters.en: And he prepared great provision for them: and when they had eaten and drunk, he sent them away, and they went to their master. So the bands of Syria came no more into the land of Israel.

chapters.zh: 此后，亚兰王便哈达聚集他的全军，上来围困撒玛利亚。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after this, that Benhadad king of Syria gathered all his host, and went up, and besieged Samaria.

chapters.zh: 于是撒玛利亚被围困，有饥荒，甚至一个驴头值银八十舍客勒，二升鸽子粪值银五舍客勒。
chapters.en: And there was a great famine in Samaria: and, behold, they besieged it, until an ass's head was for fourscore of silver, and the fourth part of a cab of dove's dung for five of silver.

chapters.zh: 一日，以色列王在城上经过，有一个妇人向他呼叫说：我主，我王啊！求你帮助。
chapters.en: And as the king of Israel was passing by upon the wall, there cried a woman unto him, saying, Help, my lord, O king.

chapters.zh: 王说：耶和华不帮助你，我从何处帮助你？是从禾场，是从酒醡呢？
chapters.en: And he said, If the LORD do not help thee, whence shall I help thee? out of the barnfloor, or out of the winepress?

chapters.zh: 王问妇人说：你有甚么苦处？他回答说：这妇人对我说：将你的儿子取来，我们今日可以吃，明日可以吃我的儿子。
chapters.en: And the king said unto her, What aileth thee? And she answered, This woman said unto me, Give thy son, that we may eat him to day, and we will eat my son to morrow.

chapters.zh: 我们就煮了我的儿子吃了。次日我对他说：要将你的儿子取来，我们可以吃。他却将他的儿子藏起来了。
chapters.en: So we boiled my son, and did eat him: and I said unto her on the next day, Give thy son, that we may eat him: and she hath hid her son.

chapters.zh: 王听见妇人的话，就撕裂衣服；（王在城上经过）百姓看见王贴身穿著麻衣。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the king heard the words of the woman, that he rent his clothes; and he passed by upon the wall, and the people looked, and, behold, sackcloth within upon his flesh.

chapters.zh: 王说：我今日若容沙法的儿子以利沙的头仍在他项上，愿神重重地降罚与我！
chapters.en: Then he said, God do so and more also to me, if the head of Elisha the son of Shaphat shall stand on him this day.

chapters.zh: 那时，以利沙正坐在家中，长老也与他同坐。王打发一个伺候他的人去；他还没有到，以利沙对长老说：你们看这凶手之子，打发人来斩我的头；你们看著使者来到，就关上门，用门将他推出去。在他后头不是有他主人脚步的响声么？
chapters.en: But Elisha sat in his house, and the elders sat with him; and sent a man from before him: but ere the messenger came to him, he said to the elders, See ye how this son of a murderer hath sent to take away mine head? look, when the messenger cometh, shut the door, and hold him fast at the door: not the sound of his master's feet behind him?

chapters.zh: 正说话的时候，使者来到，王也到了，说：这灾祸是从耶和华那里来的，我何必再仰望耶和华呢？
chapters.en: And while he yet talked with them, behold, the messenger came down unto him: and he said, Behold, this evil of the LORD; what should I wait for the LORD any longer?

chapters.zh: 以利沙说：你们要听耶和华的话，耶和华如此说：明日约到这时候，在撒玛利亚城门口，一细亚细面要卖银一舍客勒，二细亚大麦也要卖银一舍客勒。
chapters.en: Then Elisha said, Hear ye the word of the LORD; Thus saith the LORD, To morrow about this time a measure of fine flour for a shekel, and two measures of barley for a shekel, in the gate of Samaria.

chapters.zh: 有一个搀扶王的军长对神人说：即便耶和华使天开了窗户，也不能有这事。以利沙说：你必亲眼看见，却不得吃。
chapters.en: Then a lord on whose hand the king leaned answered the man of God, and said, Behold, the LORD would make windows in heaven, might this thing be? And he said, Behold, thou shalt see with thine eyes, but shalt not eat thereof.

chapters.zh: 在城门那里有四个长大痲疯的人，他们彼此说：我们为何坐在这里等死呢？
chapters.en: And there were four leprous men at the entering in of the gate: and they said one to another, Why sit we here until we die?

chapters.zh: 我们若说，进城去罢！城里有饥荒，必死在那里；若在这里坐著不动，也必是死。来罢，我们去投降亚兰人的军队，他们若留我们的活命，就活著；若杀我们，就死了罢！
chapters.en: If we say, We will enter into the city, then the famine in the city, and we shall die there: and if we sit still here, we die also. Now therefore come, and let us fall unto the host of the Syrians: if they save us alive, we shall live; and if they kill us, we shall but die.

chapters.zh: 黄昏的时候，他们起来往亚兰人的营盘去；到了 * 营边，不见一人在那里。
chapters.en: And they rose up in the twilight, to go unto the camp of the Syrians: and when they were come to the uttermost part of the camp of Syria, behold, no man there.

chapters.zh: 因为主使亚兰人的军队听见车马的声音，是大军的声音；他们就彼此说：这必是以色列王贿买赫人的诸王和埃及人的诸王来攻击我们。
chapters.en: For the Lord had made the host of the Syrians to hear a noise of chariots, and a noise of horses, the noise of a great host: and they said one to another, Lo, the king of Israel hath hired against us the kings of the Hittites, and the kings of the Egyptians, to come upon us.

chapters.zh: 所以，在黄昏的时候他们起来逃跑，撇下帐棚、马、驴，营盘照旧，只顾逃命。
chapters.en: Wherefore they arose and fled in the twilight, and left their tents, and their horses, and their asses, even the camp as it , and fled for their life.

chapters.zh: 那些长大痲疯的到了营边，进了帐棚，吃了喝了，且从其中拿出金银和衣服来，去收藏了；回来又进了一座帐棚，从其中拿出财物来去收藏了。
chapters.en: And when these lepers came to the uttermost part of the camp, they went into one tent, and did eat and drink, and carried thence silver, and gold, and raiment, and went and hid ; and came again, and entered into another tent, and carried thence , and went and hid .

chapters.zh: 那时，他们彼此说：我们所做的不好！今日是有好信息的日子，我们竟不作声！若等到天亮，罪必临到我们。来罢，我们与王家报信去！
chapters.en: Then they said one to another, We do not well: this day a day of good tidings, and we hold our peace: if we tarry till the morning light, some mischief will come upon us: now therefore come, that we may go and tell the king's household.

chapters.zh: 他们就去叫守城门的，告诉他们说：我们到了亚兰人的营，不见一人在那里，也无人声，只有拴著的马和驴，帐棚都照旧。
chapters.en: So they came and called unto the porter of the city: and they told them, saying, We came to the camp of the Syrians, and, behold, no man there, neither voice of man, but horses tied, and asses tied, and the tents as they .

chapters.zh: 守城门的叫了众守门的人来，他们就进去与王家报信。
chapters.en: And he called the porters; and they told to the king's house within.

chapters.zh: 王夜间起来，对臣仆说：我告诉你们亚兰人向我们如何行。他们知道我们饥饿，所以离营，埋伏在田野，说：以色列人出城的时候，我们就活捉他们，得以进城。
chapters.en: And the king arose in the night, and said unto his servants, I will now shew you what the Syrians have done to us. They know that we hungry; therefore are they gone out of the camp to hide themselves in the field, saying, When they come out of the city, we shall catch them alive, and get into the city.

chapters.zh: 有一个臣仆对王说：我们不如用城里剩下之马中的五匹马（马和城里剩下的以色列人都是一样，快要灭绝），打发人去窥探。
chapters.en: And one of his servants answered and said, Let take, I pray thee, five of the horses that remain, which are left in the city, (behold, they as all the multitude of Israel that are left in it: behold, , they even as all the multitude of the Israelites that are consumed:) and let us send and see.

chapters.zh: 于是取了两辆车和马，王差人去追寻亚兰军，说：你们去窥探窥探。
chapters.en: They took therefore two chariot horses; and the king sent after the host of the Syrians, saying, Go and see.

chapters.zh: 他们就追寻到约但河，看见满道上都是亚兰人急跑时丢弃的衣服器具，使者就回来报告王。
chapters.en: And they went after them unto Jordan: and, lo, all the way full of garments and vessels, which the Syrians had cast away in their haste. And the messengers returned, and told the king.

chapters.zh: 众人就出去，掳掠亚兰人的营盘。于是一细亚细面卖银一舍客勒，二细亚大麦也卖银一舍客勒，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: And the people went out, and spoiled the tents of the Syrians. So a measure of fine flour was for a shekel, and two measures of barley for a shekel, according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 王派搀扶他的那军长在城门口弹压，众人在那里将他践踏，他就死了，正如神人在王下来见他的时候所说的。
chapters.en: And the king appointed the lord on whose hand he leaned to have the charge of the gate: and the people trode upon him in the gate, and he died, as the man of God had said, who spake when the king came down to him.

chapters.zh: 神人曾对王说：明日约到这时候，在撒玛利亚城门口，二细亚大麦要卖银一舍客勒，一细亚细面也要卖银一舍客勒。
chapters.en: And it came to pass as the man of God had spoken to the king, saying, Two measures of barley for a shekel, and a measure of fine flour for a shekel, shall be to morrow about this time in the gate of Samaria:

chapters.zh: 那军长对神人说：即便耶和华使天开了窗户，也不能有这事。神人说：你必亲眼看见，却不得吃。
chapters.en: And that lord answered the man of God, and said, Now, behold, the LORD should make windows in heaven, might such a thing be? And he said, Behold, thou shalt see it with thine eyes, but shalt not eat thereof.

chapters.zh: 这话果然应验在他身上；因为众人在城门口将他践踏，他就死了。
chapters.en: And so it fell out unto him: for the people trode upon him in the gate, and he died.

chapters.zh: 以利沙曾对所救活之子的那妇人说：你和你的全家要起身往你可住的地方去住，因为耶和华命饥荒降在这地七年。
chapters.en: Then spake Elisha unto the woman, whose son he had restored to life, saying, Arise, and go thou and thine household, and sojourn wheresoever thou canst sojourn: for the LORD hath called for a famine; and it shall also come upon the land seven years.

chapters.zh: 妇人就起身，照神人的话带著全家往非利士地去，住了七年。
chapters.en: And the woman arose, and did after the saying of the man of God: and she went with her household, and sojourned in the land of the Philistines seven years.

chapters.zh: 七年完了，那妇人从非利士地回来，就出去为自己的房屋田地哀告王。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the seven years' end, that the woman returned out of the land of the Philistines: and she went forth to cry unto the king for her house and for her land.

chapters.zh: 那时王正与神人的仆人基哈西说：请你将以利沙所行的一切大事告诉我。
chapters.en: And the king talked with Gehazi the servant of the man of God, saying, Tell me, I pray thee, all the great things that Elisha hath done.

chapters.zh: 基哈西告诉王以利沙如何使死人复活，恰巧以利沙所救活、他儿子的那妇人为自己的房屋田地来哀告王。基哈西说：我主我王，这就是那妇人，这是他的儿子，就是以利沙所救活的。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as he was telling the king how he had restored a dead body to life, that, behold, the woman, whose son he had restored to life, cried to the king for her house and for her land. And Gehazi said, My lord, O king, this the woman, and this her son, whom Elisha restored to life.

chapters.zh: 王问那妇人，他就把那事告诉王。于是王为他派一个太监，说：凡属这妇人的都还给他，自从他离开本地直到今日，他田地的出产也都还给他。
chapters.en: And when the king asked the woman, she told him. So the king appointed unto her a certain officer, saying, Restore all that hers, and all the fruits of the field since the day that she left the land, even until now.

chapters.zh: 以利沙来到大马色，亚兰王便哈达正患病。有人告诉王说：神人来到这里了。
chapters.en: And Elisha came to Damascus; and Benhadad the king of Syria was sick; and it was told him, saying, The man of God is come hither.

chapters.zh: 王就吩咐哈薛说：你带著礼物去见神人，托他求问耶和华，我这病能好不能好？
chapters.en: And the king said unto Hazael, Take a present in thine hand, and go, meet the man of God, and enquire of the LORD by him, saying, Shall I recover of this disease?

chapters.zh: 于是哈薛用四十个骆驼，驮著大马色的各样美物为礼物，去见以利沙。到了他那里，站在他面前，说：你儿子亚兰王便哈达打发我来见你，他问说：我这病能好不能好？
chapters.en: So Hazael went to meet him, and took a present with him, even of every good thing of Damascus, forty camels' burden, and came and stood before him, and said, Thy son Benhadad king of Syria hath sent me to thee, saying, Shall I recover of this disease?

chapters.zh: 以利沙对哈薛说：你回去告诉他说，这病必能好；但耶和华指示我，他必要死。
chapters.en: And Elisha said unto him, Go, say unto him, Thou mayest certainly recover: howbeit the LORD hath shewed me that he shall surely die.

chapters.zh: 神人定睛看著哈薛，甚至他惭愧。神人就哭了；
chapters.en: And he settled his countenance stedfastly, until he was ashamed: and the man of God wept.

chapters.zh: 哈薛说：我主为甚么哭？回答说：因为我知道你必苦害以色列人，用火焚烧他们的保障，用刀杀死他们的壮丁，摔死他们的婴孩，剖开他们的孕妇。
chapters.en: And Hazael said, Why weepeth my lord? And he answered, Because I know the evil that thou wilt do unto the children of Israel: their strong holds wilt thou set on fire, and their young men wilt thou slay with the sword, and wilt dash their children, and rip up their women with child.

chapters.zh: 哈薛说：你仆人算甚么，不过是一条狗，焉能行这大事呢？以利沙回答说：耶和华指示我，你必作亚兰王。
chapters.en: And Hazael said, But what, thy servant a dog, that he should do this great thing? And Elisha answered, The LORD hath shewed me that thou king over Syria.

chapters.zh: 哈薛离开以利沙，回去见他的主人。主人问他说：以利沙对你说甚么？回答说：他告诉我你必能好。
chapters.en: So he departed from Elisha, and came to his master; who said to him, What said Elisha to thee? And he answered, He told me thou shouldest surely recover.

chapters.zh: 次日，哈薛拿被窝浸在水中，蒙住王的脸，王就死了。于是哈薛篡了他的位。
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the morrow, that he took a thick cloth, and dipped in water, and spread on his face, so that he died: and Hazael reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王亚哈的儿子约兰第五年，犹大王约沙法还在位的时候，约沙法的儿子约兰登基作了犹大王。
chapters.en: And in the fifth year of Joram the son of Ahab king of Israel, Jehoshaphat then king of Judah, Jehoram the son of Jehoshaphat king of Judah began to reign.

chapters.zh: 约兰登基的时候年三十二岁，在耶路撒冷作王八年。
chapters.en: Thirty and two years old was he when he began to reign; and he reigned eight years in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 他行以色列诸王所行的，与亚哈家一样；因为他娶了亚哈的女儿为妻，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事。
chapters.en: And he walked in the way of the kings of Israel, as did the house of Ahab: for the daughter of Ahab was his wife: and he did evil in the sight of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华却因他仆人大卫的缘故，仍不肯灭绝犹大，照他所应许大卫的话，永远赐灯光与他的子孙。
chapters.en: Yet the LORD would not destroy Judah for David his servant's sake, as he promised him to give him alway a light, to his children.

chapters.zh: 约兰年间，以东人背叛犹大，脱离他的权下，自己立王。
chapters.en: In his days Edom revolted from under the hand of Judah, and made a king over themselves.

chapters.zh: 约兰率领所有的战车往撒益去，夜间起来，攻打围困他的以东人和车兵长；犹大兵就逃跑，各回各家去了。
chapters.en: So Joram went over to Zair, and all the chariots with him: and he rose by night, and smote the Edomites which compassed him about, and the captains of the chariots: and the people fled into their tents.

chapters.zh: 这样，以东人背叛犹大，脱离他的权下，直到今日。那时立拿人也背叛了。
chapters.en: Yet Edom revolted from under the hand of Judah unto this day. Then Libnah revolted at the same time.

chapters.zh: 约兰其余的事，凡他所行的，都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Joram, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 约兰与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子亚哈谢接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Joram slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David: and Ahaziah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王亚哈的儿子约兰十二年，犹大王约兰的儿子亚哈谢登基。
chapters.en: In the twelfth year of Joram the son of Ahab king of Israel did Ahaziah the son of Jehoram king of Judah begin to reign.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年二十二岁，在耶路撒冷作王一年。他母亲名叫亚他利雅，是以色列王暗利的孙女。
chapters.en: Two and twenty years old Ahaziah when he began to reign; and he reigned one year in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Athaliah, the daughter of Omri king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢效法亚哈家行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，与亚哈家一样，因为他是亚哈家的女婿。
chapters.en: And he walked in the way of the house of Ahab, and did evil in the sight of the LORD, as the house of Ahab: for he the son in law of the house of Ahab.

chapters.zh: 他与亚哈的儿子约兰同往基列的拉末去，与亚兰王哈薛争战。亚兰人打伤了约兰，
chapters.en: And he went with Joram the son of Ahab to the war against Hazael king of Syria in Ramothgilead; and the Syrians wounded Joram.

chapters.zh: 约兰王回到耶斯列，医治在拉末与亚兰王哈薛打仗的时候所受的伤。犹大王约兰的儿子亚哈谢因为亚哈的儿子约兰病了，就下到耶斯列看望他。
chapters.en: And king Joram went back to be healed in Jezreel of the wounds which the Syrians had given him at Ramah, when he fought against Hazael king of Syria. And Ahaziah the son of Jehoram king of Judah went down to see Joram the son of Ahab in Jezreel, because he was sick.

chapters.zh: 先知以利沙叫了一个先知门徒来，吩咐他说：你束上腰，手拿这瓶膏油往基列的拉末去。
chapters.en: And Elisha the prophet called one of the children of the prophets, and said unto him, Gird up thy loins, and take this box of oil in thine hand, and go to Ramothgilead:

chapters.zh: 到了那里，要寻找宁示的孙子、约沙法的儿子耶户，使他从同僚中起来，带他进严密的屋子，
chapters.en: And when thou comest thither, look out there Jehu the son of Jehoshaphat the son of Nimshi, and go in, and make him arise up from among his brethren, and carry him to an inner chamber;

chapters.zh: 将瓶里的膏油倒在他头上，说：耶和华如此说：我膏你作以色列王。说完了，就开门逃跑，不要迟延。
chapters.en: Then take the box of oil, and pour on his head, and say, Thus saith the LORD, I have anointed thee king over Israel. Then open the door, and flee, and tarry not.

chapters.zh: 于是那少年先知往基列的拉末去了。
chapters.en: So the young man, the young man the prophet, went to Ramothgilead.

chapters.zh: 到了那里，看见众军长都坐著，就说：将军哪，我有话对你说。耶户说：我们众人里，你要对哪一个说呢？回答说：将军哪，我要对你说。
chapters.en: And when he came, behold, the captains of the host sitting; and he said, I have an errand to thee, O captain. And Jehu said, Unto which of all us? And he said, To thee, O captain.

chapters.zh: 耶户就起来，进了屋子，少年人将膏油倒在他头上，对他说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我膏你作耶和华民以色列的王。
chapters.en: And he arose, and went into the house; and he poured the oil on his head, and said unto him, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, I have anointed thee king over the people of the LORD, over Israel.

chapters.zh: 你要击杀你主人亚哈的全家，我好在耶洗别身上伸我仆人众先知和耶和华一切仆人流血的冤。
chapters.en: And thou shalt smite the house of Ahab thy master, that I may avenge the blood of my servants the prophets, and the blood of all the servants of the LORD, at the hand of Jezebel.

chapters.zh: 亚哈全家必都灭亡，凡属亚哈的男丁，无论是困住的、自由的，我必从以色列中剪除，
chapters.en: For the whole house of Ahab shall perish: and I will cut off from Ahab him that pisseth against the wall, and him that is shut up and left in Israel:

chapters.zh: 使亚哈的家像尼八儿子耶罗波安的家，又像亚希雅儿子巴沙的家。
chapters.en: And I will make the house of Ahab like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, and like the house of Baasha the son of Ahijah:

chapters.zh: 耶洗别必在耶斯列田里被狗所吃，无人葬埋。说完了，少年人就开门逃跑了。
chapters.en: And the dogs shall eat Jezebel in the portion of Jezreel, and none to bury . And he opened the door, and fled.

chapters.zh: 耶户出来，回到他主人的臣仆那里，有一人问他说：平安么？这狂妄的人来见你有甚么事呢？回答说：你们认得那人，也知道他说甚么。
chapters.en: Then Jehu came forth to the servants of his lord: and said unto him, all well? wherefore came this mad to thee? And he said unto them, Ye know the man, and his communication.

chapters.zh: 他们说：这是假话，你据实地告诉我们。回答说：他如此如此对我说。他说：耶和华如此说：我膏你作以色列王。
chapters.en: And they said, false; tell us now. And he said, Thus and thus spake he to me, saying, Thus saith the LORD, I have anointed thee king over Israel.

chapters.zh: 他们就急忙各将自己的衣服铺在上层台阶，使耶户坐在其上；他们吹角，说：耶户作王了！
chapters.en: Then they hasted, and took every man his garment, and put under him on the top of the stairs, and blew with trumpets, saying, Jehu is king.

chapters.zh: 这样，宁示的孙子、约沙法的儿子耶户背叛约兰。先是约兰和以色列众人因为亚兰王哈薛的缘故，把守基列的拉末；
chapters.en: So Jehu the son of Jehoshaphat the son of Nimshi conspired against Joram. (Now Joram had kept Ramothgilead, he and all Israel, because of Hazael king of Syria.

chapters.zh: 但约兰王回到耶斯列，医治与亚兰王哈薛打仗所受的伤。耶户说：若合你们的意思，就不容人逃出城往耶斯列报信去。
chapters.en: But king Joram was returned to be healed in Jezreel of the wounds which the Syrians had given him, when he fought with Hazael king of Syria.) And Jehu said, If it be your minds, let none go forth escape out of the city to go to tell in Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 于是耶户坐车往耶斯列去，因为约兰病卧在那里。犹大王亚哈谢已经下去看望他。
chapters.en: So Jehu rode in a chariot, and went to Jezreel; for Joram lay there. And Ahaziah king of Judah was come down to see Joram.

chapters.zh: 有一个守望的人站在耶斯列的楼上，看见耶户带著一群人来，就说：我看见一群人。约兰说：打发一个骑马的去迎接他们，问说：平安不平安？
chapters.en: And there stood a watchman on the tower in Jezreel, and he spied the company of Jehu as he came, and said, I see a company. And Joram said, Take an horseman, and send to meet them, and let him say, peace?

chapters.zh: 骑马的就去迎接耶户，说：王问说，平安不平安？耶户说：平安不平安与你何干？你转在我后头罢！守望的人又说：使者到了他们那里，却不回来。
chapters.en: So there went one on horseback to meet him, and said, Thus saith the king, peace? And Jehu said, What hast thou to do with peace? turn thee behind me. And the watchman told, saying, The messenger came to them, but he cometh not again.

chapters.zh: 王又打发一个骑马的去。这人到了他们那里，说：王问说，平安不平安？耶户说：平安不平安与你何干？你转在我后头罢！
chapters.en: Then he sent out a second on horseback, which came to them, and said, Thus saith the king, peace? And Jehu answered, What hast thou to do with peace? turn thee behind me.

chapters.zh: 守望的人又说：他到了他们那里，也不回来；车赶得甚猛，像宁示的孙子耶户的赶法。
chapters.en: And the watchman told, saying, He came even unto them, and cometh not again: and the driving like the driving of Jehu the son of Nimshi; for he driveth furiously.

chapters.zh: 约兰吩咐说：套车！人就给他套车。以色列王约兰和犹大王亚哈谢各坐自己的车出去迎接耶户，在耶斯列人拿伯的田那里遇见他。
chapters.en: And Joram said, Make ready. And his chariot was made ready. And Joram king of Israel and Ahaziah king of Judah went out, each in his chariot, and they went out against Jehu, and met him in the portion of Naboth the Jezreelite.

chapters.zh: 约兰见耶户就说：耶户啊，平安么？耶户说：你母亲耶洗别的淫行邪术这样多，焉能平安呢？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Joram saw Jehu, that he said, peace, Jehu? And he answered, What peace, so long as the whoredoms of thy mother Jezebel and her witchcrafts many?

chapters.zh: 约兰就转车逃跑，对亚哈谢说：亚哈谢啊，反了！
chapters.en: And Joram turned his hands, and fled, and said to Ahaziah, treachery, O Ahaziah.

chapters.zh: 耶户开满了弓，射中约兰的脊背，箭从心窝穿出，约兰就仆倒在车上。
chapters.en: And Jehu drew a bow with his full strength, and smote Jehoram between his arms, and the arrow went out at his heart, and he sunk down in his chariot.

chapters.zh: 耶户对他的军长毕甲说：你把他抛在耶斯列人拿伯的田间。你当追想，你我一同坐车跟随他父亚哈的时候，耶和华对亚哈所说的预言，
chapters.en: Then said to Bidkar his captain, Take up, cast him in the portion of the field of Naboth the Jezreelite: for remember how that, when I and thou rode together after Ahab his father, the LORD laid this burden upon him;

chapters.zh: 说：我昨日看见拿伯的血和他众子的血，我必在这块田上报应你。这是耶和华说的，现在你要照著耶和华的话，把他抛在这田间。
chapters.en: Surely I have seen yesterday the blood of Naboth, and the blood of his sons, saith the LORD; and I will requite thee in this plat, saith the LORD. Now therefore take cast him into the plat , according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚哈谢见这光景，就从园亭之路逃跑。耶户追赶他，说：把这人也杀在车上。到了靠近以伯莲的姑珥坡上击伤了他。他逃到米吉多，就死在那里。
chapters.en: But when Ahaziah the king of Judah saw , he fled by the way of the garden house. And Jehu followed after him, and said, Smite him also in the chariot. at the going up to Gur, which by Ibleam. And he fled to Megiddo, and died there.

chapters.zh: 他的臣仆用车将他的尸首送到耶路撒冷，葬在大卫城他自己的坟墓里，与他列祖同葬。
chapters.en: And his servants carried him in a chariot to Jerusalem, and buried him in his sepulchre with his fathers in the city of David.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢登基作犹大王的时候，是在亚哈的儿子约兰第十一年。
chapters.en: And in the eleventh year of Joram the son of Ahab began Ahaziah to reign over Judah.

chapters.zh: 耶户到了耶斯列；耶洗别听见就擦粉、梳头，从窗户里往外观看。
chapters.en: And when Jehu was come to Jezreel, Jezebel heard ; and she painted her face, and tired her head, and looked out at a window.

chapters.zh: 耶户进门的时候，耶洗别说：杀主人的心利啊，平安么？
chapters.en: And as Jehu entered in at the gate, she said, Zimri peace, who slew his master?

chapters.zh: 耶户抬头向窗户观看，说：谁顺从我？有两三个太监从窗户往外看他。
chapters.en: And he lifted up his face to the window, and said, Who on my side? who? And there looked out to him two three eunuchs.

chapters.zh: 耶户说：把他扔下来！他们就把他扔下来。他的血溅在墙上和马上；于是把他践踏了。
chapters.en: And he said, Throw her down. So they threw her down: and of her blood was sprinkled on the wall, and on the horses: and he trode her under foot.

chapters.zh: 耶户进去，吃了喝了，吩咐说：你们把这被咒诅的妇人葬埋了，因为他是王的女儿。
chapters.en: And when he was come in, he did eat and drink, and said, Go, see now this cursed , and bury her: for she a king's daughter.

chapters.zh: 他们就去葬埋他，只寻得他的头骨和脚，并手掌。
chapters.en: And they went to bury her: but they found no more of her than the skull, and the feet, and the palms of hands.

chapters.zh: 他们回去告诉耶户，耶户说：这正应验耶和华藉他仆人提斯比人以利亚所说的话，说：在耶斯列田间，狗必吃耶洗别的肉；
chapters.en: Wherefore they came again, and told him. And he said, This the word of the LORD, which he spake by his servant Elijah the Tishbite, saying, In the portion of Jezreel shall dogs eat the flesh of Jezebel:

chapters.zh: 耶洗别的尸首必在耶斯列田间如同粪土，甚至人不能说这是耶洗别。
chapters.en: And the carcase of Jezebel shall be as dung upon the face of the field in the portion of Jezreel; that they shall not say, This Jezebel.

chapters.zh: 亚哈有七十个儿子在撒玛利亚。耶户写信送到撒玛利亚，通知耶斯列的首领，就是长老和教养亚哈众子的人，说：
chapters.en: And Ahab had seventy sons in Samaria. And Jehu wrote letters, and sent to Samaria, unto the rulers of Jezreel, to the elders, and to them that brought up Ahab's , saying,

chapters.zh: 你们那里既有你们主人的众子和车马、器械、坚固城，
chapters.en: Now as soon as this letter cometh to you, seeing your master's sons with you, and with you chariots and horses, a fenced city also, and armour;

chapters.zh: 接了这信，就可以在你们主人的众子中选择一个贤能合宜的，使他坐他父亲的位，你们也可以为你们主人的家争战。
chapters.en: Look even out the best and meetest of your master's sons, and set on his father's throne, and fight for your master's house.

chapters.zh: 他们却甚惧怕，彼此说：二王在他面前尚且站立不住，我们怎能站得住呢。
chapters.en: But they were exceedingly afraid, and said, Behold, two kings stood not before him: how then shall we stand?

chapters.zh: 家宰、邑宰，和长老，并教养众子的人，打发人去见耶户，说：我们是你的仆人，凡你所吩咐我们的都必遵行，我们不立谁作王，你看怎样好就怎样行。
chapters.en: And he that over the house, and he that over the city, the elders also, and the bringers up , sent to Jehu, saying, We thy servants, and will do all that thou shalt bid us; we will not make any king: do thou good in thine eyes.

chapters.zh: 耶户又给他们写信说：你们若归顺我，听从我的话，明日这时候，要将你们主人众子的首级带到耶斯列来见我。那时王的儿子七十人都住在教养他们那城中的尊贵人家里。
chapters.en: Then he wrote a letter the second time to them, saying, If ye mine, and ye will hearken unto my voice, take ye the heads of the men your master's sons, and come to me to Jezreel by to morrow this time. Now the king's sons, seventy persons, with the great men of the city, which brought them up.

chapters.zh: 信一到，他们就把王的七十个儿子杀了，将首级装在筐里，送到在耶斯列的耶户那里。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the letter came to them, that they took the king's sons, and slew seventy persons, and put their heads in baskets, and sent him to Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 有使者来告诉耶户说：他们将王众子的首级送来了。耶户说：将首级在城门口堆作两堆，搁到明日。
chapters.en: And there came a messenger, and told him, saying, They have brought the heads of the king's sons. And he said, Lay ye them in two heaps at the entering in of the gate until the morning.

chapters.zh: 次日早晨，耶户出来，站著对众民说：你们都是公义的，我背叛我主人，将他杀了；这些人却是谁杀的呢？
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the morning, that he went out, and stood, and said to all the people, Ye righteous: behold, I conspired against my master, and slew him: but who slew all these?

chapters.zh: 由此可知，耶和华指著亚哈家所说的话一句没有落空，因为耶和华藉他仆人以利亚所说的话都成就了。
chapters.en: Know now that there shall fall unto the earth nothing of the word of the LORD, which the LORD spake concerning the house of Ahab: for the LORD hath done which he spake by his servant Elijah.

chapters.zh: 凡亚哈家在耶斯列所剩下的人和他的大臣、密友、祭司，耶户尽都杀了，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: So Jehu slew all that remained of the house of Ahab in Jezreel, and all his great men, and his kinsfolks, and his priests, until he left him none remaining.

chapters.zh: 耶户起身往撒玛利亚去。在路上、牧人剪羊毛之处，
chapters.en: And he arose and departed, and came to Samaria. as he at the shearing house in the way,

chapters.zh: 遇见犹大王亚哈谢的弟兄，问他们说：你们是谁？回答说：我们是亚哈谢的弟兄，现在下去要问王和太后的众子安。
chapters.en: Jehu met with the brethren of Ahaziah king of Judah, and said, Who ye? And they answered, We the brethren of Ahaziah; and we go down to salute the children of the king and the children of the queen.

chapters.zh: 耶户吩咐说：活捉他们！跟从的人就活捉了他们，将他们杀在剪羊毛之处的坑边，共四十二人，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: And he said, Take them alive. And they took them alive, and slew them at the pit of the shearing house, two and forty men; neither left he any of them.

chapters.zh: 耶户从那里前行，恰遇利甲的儿子约拿达来迎接他，耶户问他安，对他说：你诚心待我像我诚心待你么？约拿达回答说：是。耶户说：若是这样，你向我伸手，他就伸手；耶户拉他上车。
chapters.en: And when he was departed thence, he lighted on Jehonadab the son of Rechab to meet him: and he saluted him, and said to him, Is thine heart right, as my heart with thy heart? And Jehonadab answered, It is. If it be, give thine hand. And he gave his hand; and he took him up to him into the chariot.

chapters.zh: 耶户说：你和我同去，看我为耶和华怎样热心；于是请他坐在车上，
chapters.en: And he said, Come with me, and see my zeal for the LORD. So they made him ride in his chariot.

chapters.zh: 到了撒玛利亚，就把撒玛利亚的亚哈家剩下的人都杀了，直到灭尽，正如耶和华对以利亚所说的。
chapters.en: And when he came to Samaria, he slew all that remained unto Ahab in Samaria, till he had destroyed him, according to the saying of the LORD, which he spake to Elijah.

chapters.zh: 耶户招聚众民，对他们说：亚哈事奉巴力还冷淡，耶户却更热心。
chapters.en: And Jehu gathered all the people together, and said unto them, Ahab served Baal a little; Jehu shall serve him much.

chapters.zh: 现在我要给巴力献大祭。应当叫巴力的众先知和一切拜巴力的人，并巴力的众祭司，都到我这里来，不可缺少一个；凡不来的必不得活。耶户这样行，是用诡计要杀尽拜巴力的人。
chapters.en: Now therefore call unto me all the prophets of Baal, all his servants, and all his priests; let none be wanting: for I have a great sacrifice to Baal; whosoever shall be wanting, he shall not live. But Jehu did in subtilty, to the intent that he might destroy the worshippers of Baal.

chapters.zh: 耶户说：要为巴力宣告严肃会！于是宣告了。
chapters.en: And Jehu said, Proclaim a solemn assembly for Baal. And they proclaimed .

chapters.zh: 耶户差人走遍以色列地；凡拜巴力的人都来齐了，没有一个不来的。他们进了巴力庙，巴力庙中从前边直到后边都满了人。
chapters.en: And Jehu sent through all Israel: and all the worshippers of Baal came, so that there was not a man left that came not. And they came into the house of Baal; and the house of Baal was full from one end to another.

chapters.zh: 耶户吩咐掌管礼服的人说：拿出礼服来，给一切拜巴力的人穿。他就拿出礼服来给了他们。
chapters.en: And he said unto him that over the vestry, Bring forth vestments for all the worshippers of Baal. And he brought them forth vestments.

chapters.zh: 耶户和利甲的儿子约拿达进了巴力庙，对拜巴力的人说：你们察看察看，在你们这里不可有耶和华的仆人，只可容留拜巴力的人。
chapters.en: And Jehu went, and Jehonadab the son of Rechab, into the house of Baal, and said unto the worshippers of Baal, Search, and look that there be here with you none of the servants of the LORD, but the worshippers of Baal only.

chapters.zh: 耶户和约拿达进去，献平安祭和燔祭。耶户先安排八十人在庙外，吩咐说：我将这些人交在你们手中，若有一人脱逃，谁放的必叫他偿命！
chapters.en: And when they went in to offer sacrifices and burnt offerings, Jehu appointed fourscore men without, and said, any of the men whom I have brought into your hands escape, , his life for the life of him.

chapters.zh: 耶户献完了燔祭，就出来吩咐护卫兵和众军长说：你们进去杀他们，不容一人出来！护卫兵和军长就用刀杀他们，将尸首抛出去，便到巴力庙的城去了，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as soon as he had made an end of offering the burnt offering, that Jehu said to the guard and to the captains, Go in, slay them; let none come forth. And they smote them with the edge of the sword; and the guard and the captains cast out, and went to the city of the house of Baal.

chapters.zh: 将巴力庙中的柱像都拿出来烧了；
chapters.en: And they brought forth the images out of the house of Baal, and burned them.

chapters.zh: 毁坏了巴力柱像，拆毁了巴力庙作为厕所，直到今日。
chapters.en: And they brake down the image of Baal, and brake down the house of Baal, and made it a draught house unto this day.

chapters.zh: 这样，耶户在以色列中灭了巴力。
chapters.en: Thus Jehu destroyed Baal out of Israel.

chapters.zh: 只是耶户不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，就是拜伯特利和但的金牛犊。
chapters.en: Howbeit the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin, Jehu departed not from after them, , the golden calves that in Bethel, and that in Dan.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对耶户说：因你办好我眼中看为正的事，照我的心意待亚哈家，你的子孙必接续你坐以色列的国位，直到四代。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Jehu, Because thou hast done well in executing right in mine eyes, hast done unto the house of Ahab according to all that in mine heart, thy children of the fourth shall sit on the throne of Israel.

chapters.zh: 只是耶户不尽心遵守耶和华 ─ 以色列神的律法，不离开耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: But Jehu took no heed to walk in the law of the LORD God of Israel with all his heart: for he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam, which made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 在那些日子，耶和华才割裂以色列国，使哈薛攻击以色列的境界，
chapters.en: In those days the LORD began to cut Israel short: and Hazael smote them in all the coasts of Israel;

chapters.zh: 乃是约但河东、基列全地，从靠近亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥起，就是基列和巴珊的迦得人、流便人、玛拿西人之地。
chapters.en: From Jordan eastward, all the land of Gilead, the Gadites, and the Reubenites, and the Manassites, from Aroer, which by the river Arnon, even Gilead and Bashan.

chapters.zh: 耶户其余的事，凡他所行的和他的勇力都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehu, and all that he did, and all his might, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 耶户与他列祖同睡，葬在撒玛利亚；他儿子约哈斯接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Jehu slept with his fathers: and they buried him in Samaria. And Jehoahaz his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 耶户在撒玛利亚作以色列王二十八年。
chapters.en: And the time that Jehu reigned over Israel in Samaria twenty and eight years.

chapters.zh: 亚哈谢的母亲亚他利雅见他儿子死了，就起来剿灭王室。
chapters.en: And when Athaliah the mother of Ahaziah saw that her son was dead, she arose and destroyed all the seed royal.

chapters.zh: 但约兰王的女儿，亚哈谢的妹子约示巴，将亚哈谢的儿子约阿施从那被杀的王子中偷出来，把他和他的乳母都藏在卧房里，躲避亚他利雅，免得被杀。
chapters.en: But Jehosheba, the daughter of king Joram, sister of Ahaziah, took Joash the son of Ahaziah, and stole him from among the king's sons slain; and they hid him, him and his nurse, in the bedchamber from Athaliah, so that he was not slain.

chapters.zh: 约阿施和他的乳母藏在耶和华的殿里六年；亚他利雅篡了国位。
chapters.en: And he was with her hid in the house of the LORD six years. And Athaliah did reign over the land.

chapters.zh: 第七年，耶何耶大打发人叫迦利人 ( 或作亲兵 ) 和护卫兵的众百夫长来，领他们进了耶和华的殿，与他们立约，使他们在耶和华殿里起誓，又将王的儿子指给他们看，
chapters.en: And the seventh year Jehoiada sent and fetched the rulers over hundreds, with the captains and the guard, and brought them to him into the house of the LORD, and made a covenant with them, and took an oath of them in the house of the LORD, and shewed them the king's son.

chapters.zh: 吩咐他们说：你们当这样行：凡安息日进班的三分之一要看守王宫，
chapters.en: And he commanded them, saying, This the thing that ye shall do; A third part of you that enter in on the sabbath shall even be keepers of the watch of the king's house;

chapters.zh: 三分之一要在苏珥门，三分之一要在护卫兵院的后门。这样把守王宫，拦阻闲人。
chapters.en: And a third part at the gate of Sur; and a third part at the gate behind the guard: so shall ye keep the watch of the house, that it be not broken down.

chapters.zh: 你们安息日所有出班的三分之二要在耶和华的殿里护卫王；
chapters.en: And two parts of all you that go forth on the sabbath, even they shall keep the watch of the house of the LORD about the king.

chapters.zh: 各人手拿兵器，四围护卫王。凡擅入你们班次的必当治死，王出入的时候，你们当跟随他。
chapters.en: And ye shall compass the king round about, every man with his weapons in his hand: and he that cometh within the ranges, let him be slain: and be ye with the king as he goeth out and as he cometh in.

chapters.zh: 众百夫长就照著祭司耶何耶大一切所吩咐的去行，各带所管安息日进班出班的人来见祭司耶何耶大。
chapters.en: And the captains over the hundreds did according to all that Jehoiada the priest commanded: and they took every man his men that were to come in on the sabbath, with them that should go out on the sabbath, and came to Jehoiada the priest.

chapters.zh: 祭司便将耶和华殿里所藏大卫王的枪和盾牌交给百夫长。
chapters.en: And to the captains over hundreds did the priest give king David's spears and shields, that in the temple of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 护卫兵手中各拿兵器，在坛和殿那里，从殿右直到殿左，站在王子的四围。
chapters.en: And the guard stood, every man with his weapons in his hand, round about the king, from the right corner of the temple to the left corner of the temple, by the altar and the temple.

chapters.zh: 祭司领王子出来，给他戴上冠冕，将律法书交给他，膏他作王；众人就拍掌说：愿王万岁！
chapters.en: And he brought forth the king's son, and put the crown upon him, and the testimony; and they made him king, and anointed him; and they clapped their hands, and said, God save the king.

chapters.zh: 亚他利雅听见护卫兵和民的声音，就到民那里，进耶和华的殿，
chapters.en: And when Athaliah heard the noise of the guard of the people, she came to the people into the temple of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 看见王照例站在柱旁，百夫长和吹号的人侍立在王左右，国中的众民欢乐吹号；亚他利雅就撕裂衣服，喊叫说：反了！反了！
chapters.en: And when she looked, behold, the king stood by a pillar, as the manner , and the princes and the trumpeters by the king, and all the people of the land rejoiced, and blew with trumpets: and Athaliah rent her clothes, and cried, Treason, Treason.

chapters.zh: 祭司耶何耶大吩咐管辖军兵的百夫长说：将他赶出班外，凡跟随他的必用刀杀死！因为祭司说不可在耶和华殿里杀他，
chapters.en: But Jehoiada the priest commanded the captains of the hundreds, the officers of the host, and said unto them, Have her forth without the ranges: and him that followeth her kill with the sword. For the priest had said, Let her not be slain in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 众兵就闪开让他去；他从马路上王宫去，便在那里被杀。
chapters.en: And they laid hands on her; and she went by the way by the which the horses came into the king's house: and there was she slain.

chapters.zh: 耶何耶大使王和民与耶和华立约，作耶和华的民；又使王与民立约。
chapters.en: And Jehoiada made a covenant between the LORD and the king and the people, that they should be the LORD'S people; between the king also and the people.

chapters.zh: 于是国民都到巴力庙，拆毁了庙，打碎坛和像，又在坛前将巴力的祭司玛坦杀了。祭司耶何耶大派官看守耶和华的殿，
chapters.en: And all the people of the land went into the house of Baal, and brake it down; his altars and his images brake they in pieces thoroughly, and slew Mattan the priest of Baal before the altars. And the priest appointed officers over the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 又率领百夫长和迦利人 ( 或作亲兵 ) 与护卫兵，以及国中的众民，请王从耶和华殿下来，由护卫兵的门进入王宫，他就坐了王位。
chapters.en: And he took the rulers over hundreds, and the captains, and the guard, and all the people of the land; and they brought down the king from the house of the LORD, and came by the way of the gate of the guard to the king's house. And he sat on the throne of the kings.

chapters.zh: 国民都欢乐，合城都安静。众人已将亚他利雅在王宫那里用刀杀了。
chapters.en: And all the people of the land rejoiced, and the city was in quiet: and they slew Athaliah with the sword the king's house.

chapters.zh: 约阿施登基的时候年方七岁。
chapters.en: Seven years old Jehoash when he began to reign.

chapters.zh: 耶户第七年，约阿施登基，在耶路撒冷作王四十年。他母亲名叫西比亚，是别是巴人。
chapters.en: In the seventh year of Jehu Jehoash began to reign; and forty years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Zibiah of Beersheba.

chapters.zh: 约阿施在祭司耶何耶大教训他的时候，就行耶和华眼中看为正的事；
chapters.en: And Jehoash did right in the sight of the LORD all his days wherein Jehoiada the priest instructed him.

chapters.zh: 只是邱坛还没有废去，百姓仍在那里献祭烧香。
chapters.en: But the high places were not taken away: the people still sacrificed and burnt incense in the high places.

chapters.zh: 约阿施对众祭司说：凡奉到耶和华殿分别为圣之物所值通用的银子，或各人当纳的身价，或乐意奉到耶和华殿的银子，
chapters.en: And Jehoash said to the priests, All the money of the dedicated things that is brought into the house of the LORD, the money of every one that passeth , the money that every man is set at, all the money that cometh into any man's heart to bring into the house of the LORD,

chapters.zh: 你们当从所认识的人收了来，修理殿的一切破坏之处。
chapters.en: Let the priests take to them, every man of his acquaintance: and let them repair the breaches of the house, wheresoever any breach shall be found.

chapters.zh: 无奈到了约阿施王二十三年，祭司仍未修理殿的破坏之处。
chapters.en: But it was in the three and twentieth year of king Jehoash the priests had not repaired the breaches of the house.

chapters.zh: 所以约阿施王召了大祭司耶何耶大和众祭司来，对他们说：你们怎么不修理殿的破坏之处呢？从今以后，你们不要从所认识的人再收银子，要将所收的交出来，修理殿的破坏之处。
chapters.en: Then king Jehoash called for Jehoiada the priest, and the priests, and said unto them, Why repair ye not the breaches of the house? now therefore receive no money of your acquaintance, but deliver it for the breaches of the house.

chapters.zh: 众祭司答应不再收百姓的银子，也不修理殿的破坏之处。
chapters.en: And the priests consented to receive no money of the people, neither to repair the breaches of the house.

chapters.zh: 祭司耶何耶大取了一个柜子，在柜盖上钻了一个窟窿，放于坛旁，在进耶和华殿的右边；守门的祭司将奉到耶和华殿的一切银子投在柜里。
chapters.en: But Jehoiada the priest took a chest, and bored a hole in the lid of it, and set it beside the altar, on the right side as one cometh into the house of the LORD: and the priests that kept the door put therein all the money brought into the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 他们见柜里的银子多了，便叫王的书记和大祭司上来，将耶和华殿里的银子数算包起来。
chapters.en: And it was , when they saw that much money in the chest, that the king's scribe and the high priest came up, and they put up in bags, and told the money that was found in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 把所平的银子交给督工的，就是耶和华殿里办事的人；他们把银子转交修理耶和华殿的木匠和工人，
chapters.en: And they gave the money, being told, into the hands of them that did the work, that had the oversight of the house of the LORD: and they laid it out to the carpenters and builders, that wrought upon the house of the LORD,

chapters.zh: 并瓦匠、石匠，又买木料和凿成的石头，修理耶和华殿的破坏之处，以及修理殿的各样使用。
chapters.en: And to masons, and hewers of stone, and to buy timber and hewed stone to repair the breaches of the house of the LORD, and for all that was laid out for the house to repair .

chapters.zh: 但那奉到耶和华殿的银子，没有用以做耶和华殿里的银杯、蜡剪、碗、号，和别样的金银器皿，
chapters.en: Howbeit there were not made for the house of the LORD bowls of silver, snuffers, basons, trumpets, any vessels of gold, or vessels of silver, of the money brought into the house of the LORD:

chapters.zh: 乃将那银子交给督工的人修理耶和华的殿；
chapters.en: But they gave that to the workmen, and repaired therewith the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 且将银子交给办事的人转交做工的人，不与他们算账，因为他们办事诚实。
chapters.en: Moreover they reckoned not with the men, into whose hand they delivered the money to be bestowed on workmen: for they dealt faithfully.

chapters.zh: 惟有赎愆祭、赎罪祭的银子没有奉到耶和华的殿，都归祭司。
chapters.en: The trespass money and sin money was not brought into the house of the LORD: it was the priests'.

chapters.zh: 那时，亚兰王哈薛上来攻打迦特，攻取了，就定意上来攻打耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: Then Hazael king of Syria went up, and fought against Gath, and took it: and Hazael set his face to go up to Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约阿施将他列祖犹大王约沙法、约兰、亚哈谢所分别为圣的物和自己所分别为圣的物，并耶和华殿与王宫府库里所有的金子都送给亚兰王哈薛；哈薛就不上耶路撒冷来了。
chapters.en: And Jehoash king of Judah took all the hallowed things that Jehoshaphat, and Jehoram, and Ahaziah, his fathers, kings of Judah, had dedicated, and his own hallowed things, and all the gold found in the treasures of the house of the LORD, and in the king's house, and sent to Hazael king of Syria: and he went away from Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 约阿施其余的事，凡他所行的都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Joash, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 约阿施的臣仆起来背叛，在下悉拉的米罗宫那里将他杀了。
chapters.en: And his servants arose, and made a conspiracy, and slew Joash in the house of Millo, which goeth down to Silla.

chapters.zh: 杀他的那臣仆就是示米押的儿子约撒甲和朔默的儿子约萨拔。众人将他葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子亚玛谢接续他作王。
chapters.en: For Jozachar the son of Shimeath, and Jehozabad the son of Shomer, his servants, smote him, and he died; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Amaziah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚哈谢的儿子约阿施二十三年，耶户的儿子约哈斯在撒玛利亚登基作以色列王十七年。
chapters.en: In the three and twentieth year of Joash the son of Ahaziah king of Judah Jehoahaz the son of Jehu began to reign over Israel in Samaria, seventeen years.

chapters.zh: 约哈斯行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，总不离开。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and followed the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, which made Israel to sin; he departed not therefrom.

chapters.zh: 于是，耶和华的怒气向以色列人发作，将他们屡次交在亚兰王哈薛和他儿子便哈达的手里。
chapters.en: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against Israel, and he delivered them into the hand of Hazael king of Syria, and into the hand of Benhadad the son of Hazael, all days.
