chapters.zh: 约哈斯恳求耶和华，耶和华就应允他，因为见以色列人所受亚兰王的欺压。
chapters.en: And Jehoahaz besought the LORD, and the LORD hearkened unto him: for he saw the oppression of Israel, because the king of Syria oppressed them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华赐给以色列人一位拯救者，使他们脱离亚兰人的手；于是以色列人仍旧安居在家里。
chapters.en: (And the LORD gave Israel a saviour, so that they went out from under the hand of the Syrians: and the children of Israel dwelt in their tents, as beforetime.

chapters.zh: 然而他们不离开耶罗波安家使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，仍然去行，并且在撒玛利亚留下亚舍拉。
chapters.en: Nevertheless they departed not from the sins of the house of Jeroboam, who made Israel sin, walked therein: and there remained the grove also in Samaria.)

chapters.zh: 亚兰王灭绝约哈斯的民，践踏他们如禾场上的尘沙，只给约哈斯留下五十马兵，十辆战车，一万步兵。
chapters.en: Neither did he leave of the people to Jehoahaz but fifty horsemen, and ten chariots, and ten thousand footmen; for the king of Syria had destroyed them, and had made them like the dust by threshing.

chapters.zh: 约哈斯其余的事，凡他所行的和他的勇力都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoahaz, and all that he did, and his might, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 约哈斯与他列祖同睡，葬在撒玛利亚。他儿子约阿施接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Jehoahaz slept with his fathers; and they buried him in Samaria: and Joash his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约阿施三十七年，约哈斯的儿子约阿施在撒玛利亚登基作以色列王十六年。
chapters.en: In the thirty and seventh year of Joash king of Judah began Jehoash the son of Jehoahaz to reign over Israel in Samaria, sixteen years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的一切罪，仍然去行。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD; he departed not from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel sin: he walked therein.

chapters.zh: 约阿施其余的事，凡他所行的和他与犹大王亚玛谢争战的勇力，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Joash, and all that he did, and his might wherewith he fought against Amaziah king of Judah, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 约阿施与他列祖同睡，耶罗波安坐了他的位。约阿施与以色列诸王一同葬在撒玛利亚。
chapters.en: And Joash slept with his fathers; and Jeroboam sat upon his throne: and Joash was buried in Samaria with the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以利沙得了必死的病，以色列王约阿施下来看他，伏在他脸上哭泣，说：我父啊！我父啊！以色列的战车马兵啊！
chapters.en: Now Elisha was fallen sick of his sickness whereof he died. And Joash the king of Israel came down unto him, and wept over his face, and said, O my father, my father, the chariot of Israel, and the horsemen thereof.

chapters.zh: 以利沙对他说：你取弓箭来。王就取了弓箭来；
chapters.en: And Elisha said unto him, Take bow and arrows. And he took unto him bow and arrows.

chapters.zh: 又对以色列王说：你用手拿弓。王就用手拿弓。以利沙按手在王的手上，
chapters.en: And he said to the king of Israel, Put thine hand upon the bow. And he put his hand : and Elisha put his hands upon the king's hands.

chapters.zh: 说：你开朝东的窗户。他就开了。以利沙说：射箭罢！他就射箭。以利沙说：这是耶和华的得胜箭，就是战胜亚兰人的箭；因为你必在亚弗攻打亚兰人，直到灭尽他们。
chapters.en: And he said, Open the window eastward. And he opened . Then Elisha said, Shoot. And he shot. And he said, The arrow of the LORD'S deliverance, and the arrow of deliverance from Syria: for thou shalt smite the Syrians in Aphek, till thou have consumed .

chapters.zh: 以利沙又说：取几枝箭来。他就取了来。以利沙说：打地罢！他打了三次，便止住了。
chapters.en: And he said, Take the arrows. And he took . And he said unto the king of Israel, Smite upon the ground. And he smote thrice, and stayed.

chapters.zh: 神人向他发怒，说：应当击打五六次，就能攻打亚兰人直到灭尽；现在只能打败亚兰人三次。
chapters.en: And the man of God was wroth with him, and said, Thou shouldest have smitten five or six times; then hadst thou smitten Syria till thou hadst consumed : whereas now thou shalt smite Syria thrice.

chapters.zh: 以利沙死了，人将他葬埋。到了新年，有一群摩押人犯境，
chapters.en: And Elisha died, and they buried him. And the bands of the Moabites invaded the land at the coming in of the year.

chapters.zh: 有人正葬死人，忽然看见一群人，就把死人抛在以利沙的坟墓里，一碰著以利沙的骸骨，死人就复活，站起来了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as they were burying a man, that, behold, they spied a band ; and they cast the man into the sepulchre of Elisha: and when the man was let down, and touched the bones of Elisha, he revived, and stood up on his feet.

chapters.zh: 约哈斯年间，亚兰王哈薛屡次欺压以色列人。
chapters.en: But Hazael king of Syria oppressed Israel all the days of Jehoahaz.

chapters.zh: 耶和华却因与亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所立的约，仍施恩给以色列人，怜恤他们，眷顾他们，不肯灭尽他们，尚未赶逐他们离开自己面前。
chapters.en: And the LORD was gracious unto them, and had compassion on them, and had respect unto them, because of his covenant with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, and would not destroy them, neither cast he them from his presence as yet.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王哈薛死了，他儿子便哈达接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Hazael king of Syria died; and Benhadad his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 从前哈薛和约阿施的父亲约哈斯争战，攻取了些城邑，现在约哈斯的儿子约阿施三次打败哈薛的儿子便哈达，就收回了以色列的城邑。
chapters.en: And Jehoash the son of Jehoahaz took again out of the hand of Benhadad the son of Hazael the cities, which he had taken out of the hand of Jehoahaz his father by war. Three times did Joash beat him, and recovered the cities of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列王约哈斯的儿子约阿施第二年，犹大王约阿施的儿子亚玛谢登基。
chapters.en: In the second year of Joash son of Jehoahaz king of Israel reigned Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年二十五岁，在耶路撒冷作王二十九年。他母亲名叫约耶但，是耶路撒冷人。
chapters.en: He was twenty and five years old when he began to reign, and reigned twenty and nine years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Jehoaddan of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 亚玛谢行耶和华眼中看为正的事，但不如他祖大卫，乃效法他父约阿施一切所行的；
chapters.en: And he did right in the sight of the LORD, yet not like David his father: he did according to all things as Joash his father did.

chapters.zh: 只是邱坛还没有废去，百姓仍在那里献祭烧香。
chapters.en: Howbeit the high places were not taken away: as yet the people did sacrifice and burnt incense on the high places.

chapters.zh: 国一坚定，就把杀他父王的臣仆杀了，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as soon as the kingdom was confirmed in his hand, that he slew his servants which had slain the king his father.

chapters.zh: 却没有治死杀王之人的儿子，是照摩西律法书上耶和华所吩咐的说：不可因子杀父，也不可因父杀子，各人要为本身的罪而死。
chapters.en: But the children of the murderers he slew not: according unto that which is written in the book of the law of Moses, wherein the LORD commanded, saying, The fathers shall not be put to death for the children, nor the children be put to death for the fathers; but every man shall be put to death for his own sin.

chapters.zh: 亚玛谢在盐谷杀了以东人一万，又攻取了西拉，改名叫约帖，直到今日。
chapters.en: He slew of Edom in the valley of salt ten thousand, and took Selah by war, and called the name of it Joktheel unto this day.

chapters.zh: 那时，亚玛谢差遣使者去见耶户的孙子约哈斯的儿子以色列王约阿施，说：你来，我们二人相见于战场。
chapters.en: Then Amaziah sent messengers to Jehoash, the son of Jehoahaz son of Jehu, king of Israel, saying, Come, let us look one another in the face.

chapters.zh: 以色列王约阿施差遣使者去见犹大王亚玛谢，说：利巴嫩的蒺藜差遣使者去见利巴嫩的香柏树，说：将你的女儿给我儿子为妻。后来利巴嫩有一个野兽经过，把蒺藜践踏了。
chapters.en: And Jehoash the king of Israel sent to Amaziah king of Judah, saying, The thistle that in Lebanon sent to the cedar that in Lebanon, saying, Give thy daughter to my son to wife: and there passed by a wild beast that in Lebanon, and trode down the thistle.

chapters.zh: 你打败了以东人就心高气傲，你以此为荣耀，在家里安居就罢了，为何要惹祸，使自己和犹大国一同败亡呢？
chapters.en: Thou hast indeed smitten Edom, and thine heart hath lifted thee up: glory , and tarry at home: for why shouldest thou meddle to hurt, that thou shouldest fall, thou, and Judah with thee?

chapters.zh: 亚玛谢却不肯听这话。于是以色列王约阿施上来，在犹大的伯示麦与犹大王亚玛谢相见于战场。
chapters.en: But Amaziah would not hear. Therefore Jehoash king of Israel went up; and he and Amaziah king of Judah looked one another in the face at Bethshemesh, which to Judah.

chapters.zh: 犹大人败在以色列人面前，各自逃回家里去了。
chapters.en: And Judah was put to the worse before Israel; and they fled every man to their tents.

chapters.zh: 以色列王约阿施在伯示麦擒住亚哈谢的孙子、约阿施的儿子犹大王亚玛谢，就来到耶路撒冷，拆毁耶路撒冷的城墙，从以法莲门直到角门共四百肘，
chapters.en: And Jehoash king of Israel took Amaziah king of Judah, the son of Jehoash the son of Ahaziah, at Bethshemesh, and came to Jerusalem, and brake down the wall of Jerusalem from the gate of Ephraim unto the corner gate, four hundred cubits.

chapters.zh: 又将耶和华殿里与王宫府库里所有的金银和器皿都拿了去，并带人去为质，就回撒玛利亚去了。
chapters.en: And he took all the gold and silver, and all the vessels that were found in the house of the LORD, and in the treasures of the king's house, and hostages, and returned to Samaria.

chapters.zh: 约阿施其余所行的事和他的勇力，并与犹大王亚玛谢争战的事，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoash which he did, and his might, and how he fought with Amaziah king of Judah, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 约阿施与他列祖同睡，葬在撒玛利亚，以色列诸王的坟地里。他儿子耶罗波安接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Jehoash slept with his fathers, and was buried in Samaria with the kings of Israel; and Jeroboam his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王约哈斯的儿子约阿施死后，犹大王约阿施的儿子亚玛谢又活了十五年。
chapters.en: And Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah lived after the death of Jehoash son of Jehoahaz king of Israel fifteen years.

chapters.zh: 亚玛谢其余的事都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Amaziah, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷有人背叛亚玛谢，他就逃到拉吉；叛党却打发人到拉吉将他杀了。
chapters.en: Now they made a conspiracy against him in Jerusalem: and he fled to Lachish; but they sent after him to Lachish, and slew him there.

chapters.zh: 人就用马将他的尸首驮到耶路撒冷，葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。
chapters.en: And they brought him on horses: and he was buried at Jerusalem with his fathers in the city of David.

chapters.zh: 犹大众民立亚玛谢的儿子亚撒利雅 ( 又名乌西雅 ) 接续他父作王，那时他年十六岁。
chapters.en: And all the people of Judah took Azariah, which sixteen years old, and made him king instead of his father Amaziah.

chapters.zh: 亚玛谢与他列祖同睡之后，亚撒利雅收回以拉他仍归犹大，又重新修理。
chapters.en: He built Elath, and restored it to Judah, after that the king slept with his fathers.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约阿施的儿子亚玛谢十五年，以色列王约阿施的儿子耶罗波安在撒玛利亚登基，作王四十一年。
chapters.en: In the fifteenth year of Amaziah the son of Joash king of Judah Jeroboam the son of Joash king of Israel began to reign in Samaria, forty and one years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的一切罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD: he departed not from all the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 他收回以色列边界之地，从哈马口直到亚拉巴海，正如耶和华 ─ 以色列的神藉他仆人迦特希弗人亚米太的儿子先知约拿所说的。
chapters.en: He restored the coast of Israel from the entering of Hamath unto the sea of the plain, according to the word of the LORD God of Israel, which he spake by the hand of his servant Jonah, the son of Amittai, the prophet, which of Gathhepher.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华看见以色列人甚是艰苦，无论困住的、自由的都没有了，也无人帮助以色列人。
chapters.en: For the LORD saw the affliction of Israel, very bitter: for not any shut up, nor any left, nor any helper for Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华并没有说要将以色列的名从天下涂抹，乃藉约阿施的儿子耶罗波安拯救他们。
chapters.en: And the LORD said not that he would blot out the name of Israel from under heaven: but he saved them by the hand of Jeroboam the son of Joash.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安其余的事，凡他所行的和他的勇力，他怎样争战，怎样收回大马色和先前属犹大的哈马归以色列，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, and all that he did, and his might, how he warred, and how he recovered Damascus, and Hamath, to Judah, for Israel, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安与他列祖以色列诸王同睡。他儿子撒迦利雅接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam slept with his fathers, with the kings of Israel; and Zachariah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王耶罗波安二十七年，犹大王亚玛谢的儿子亚撒利雅登基，
chapters.en: In the twenty and seventh year of Jeroboam king of Israel began Azariah son of Amaziah king of Judah to reign.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年十六岁，在耶路撒冷作王五十二年。他母亲名叫耶可利雅，是耶路撒冷人。
chapters.en: Sixteen years old was he when he began to reign, and he reigned two and fifty years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Jecholiah of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅行耶和华眼中看为正的事，效法他父亲亚玛谢一切所行的；
chapters.en: And he did right in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his father Amaziah had done;

chapters.zh: 只是邱坛还没有废去，百姓仍在那里献祭烧香。
chapters.en: Save that the high places were not removed: the people sacrificed and burnt incense still on the high places.

chapters.zh: 耶和华降灾与王，使他长大痲疯，直到死日，他就住在别的宫里。他的儿子约坦管理家事，治理国民。
chapters.en: And the LORD smote the king, so that he was a leper unto the day of his death, and dwelt in a several house. And Jotham the king's son over the house, judging the people of the land.

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅其余的事，凡他所行的都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Azariah, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 亚撒利雅与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子约坦接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Azariah slept with his fathers; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Jotham his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒利雅三十八年，耶罗波安的儿子撒迦利雅在撒玛利亚作以色列王六个月。
chapters.en: In the thirty and eighth year of Azariah king of Judah did Zachariah the son of Jeroboam reign over Israel in Samaria six months.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法他列祖所行的，不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, as his fathers had done: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 雅比的儿子沙龙背叛他，在百姓面前击杀他，篡了他的位。
chapters.en: And Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him, and smote him before the people, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 撒迦利雅其余的事都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Zachariah, behold, they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 这是从前耶和华应许耶户说：你的子孙必坐以色列的国位直到四代。这话果然应验了。
chapters.en: This the word of the LORD which he spake unto Jehu, saying, Thy sons shall sit on the throne of Israel unto the fourth . And so it came to pass.

chapters.zh: 犹大王乌西雅 ( 就是亚撒利雅 ) 三十九年，雅比的儿子沙龙登基在撒玛利亚作王一个月。
chapters.en: Shallum the son of Jabesh began to reign in the nine and thirtieth year of Uzziah king of Judah; and he reigned a full month in Samaria.

chapters.zh: 迦底的儿子米拿现从得撒上撒玛利亚，杀了雅比的儿子沙龙，篡了他的位。
chapters.en: For Menahem the son of Gadi went up from Tirzah, and came to Samaria, and smote Shallum the son of Jabesh in Samaria, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 沙龙其余的事和他背叛的情形都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Shallum, and his conspiracy which he made, behold, they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 那时米拿现从得撒起攻打提斐萨和其四境，击杀城中一切的人，剖开其中所有的孕妇，都因他们没有给他开城。
chapters.en: Then Menahem smote Tiphsah, and all that therein, and the coasts thereof from Tirzah: because they opened not , therefore he smote all the women therein that were with child he ripped up.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒利雅三十九年，迦底的儿子米拿现登基，在撒玛利亚作以色列王十年。
chapters.en: In the nine and thirtieth year of Azariah king of Judah began Menahem the son of Gadi to reign over Israel, ten years in Samaria.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，终身不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD: he departed not all his days from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 亚述王普勒来攻击以色列国，米拿现给他一千他连得银子，请普勒帮助他坚定国位。
chapters.en: Pul the king of Assyria came against the land: and Menahem gave Pul a thousand talents of silver, that his hand might be with him to confirm the kingdom in his hand.

chapters.zh: 米拿现向以色列一切大富户索要银子，使他们各出五十舍客勒，就给了亚述王。于是亚述王回去，不在国中停留。
chapters.en: And Menahem exacted the money of Israel, of all the mighty men of wealth, of each man fifty shekels of silver, to give to the king of Assyria. So the king of Assyria turned back, and stayed not there in the land.

chapters.zh: 米拿现其余的事，凡他所行的都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Menahem, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 米拿现与他列祖同睡。他儿子比加辖接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Menahem slept with his fathers; and Pekahiah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒利雅五十年，米拿现的儿子比加辖在撒玛利亚登基作以色列王二年。
chapters.en: In the fiftieth year of Azariah king of Judah Pekahiah the son of Menahem began to reign over Israel in Samaria, two years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 比加辖的将军、利玛利的儿子比加背叛他，在撒玛利亚王宫里的卫所杀了他。亚珥歌伯和亚利耶并基列的五十人帮助比加；比加击杀他，篡了他的位。
chapters.en: But Pekah the son of Remaliah, a captain of his, conspired against him, and smote him in Samaria, in the palace of the king's house, with Argob and Arieh, and with him fifty men of the Gileadites: and he killed him, and reigned in his room.

chapters.zh: 比加辖其余的事，凡他所行的都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Pekahiah, and all that he did, behold, they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒利雅五十二年，利玛利的儿子比加在撒玛利亚登基作以色列王二十年。
chapters.en: In the two and fiftieth year of Azariah king of Judah Pekah the son of Remaliah began to reign over Israel in Samaria, twenty years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，不离开尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 以色列王比加年间，亚述王提革拉毗列色来夺了以云、亚伯伯玛迦、亚挪、基低斯、夏琐、基列、加利利，和拿弗他利全地，将这些地方的居民都掳到亚述去了。
chapters.en: In the days of Pekah king of Israel came Tiglathpileser king of Assyria, and took Ijon, and Abelbethmaachah, and Janoah, and Kedesh, and Hazor, and Gilead, and Galilee, all the land of Naphtali, and carried them captive to Assyria.

chapters.zh: 乌西雅的儿子约坦二十年，以拉的儿子何细亚背叛利玛利的儿子比加，击杀他，篡了他的位。
chapters.en: And Hoshea the son of Elah made a conspiracy against Pekah the son of Remaliah, and smote him, and slew him, and reigned in his stead, in the twentieth year of Jotham the son of Uzziah.

chapters.zh: 比加其余的事，凡他所行的都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Pekah, and all that he did, behold, they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列王利玛利的儿子比加第二年，犹大王乌西雅的儿子约坦登基。
chapters.en: In the second year of Pekah the son of Remaliah king of Israel began Jotham the son of Uzziah king of Judah to reign.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年二十五岁，在耶路撒冷作王十六年。他母亲名叫耶路沙，是撒督的女儿。
chapters.en: Five and twenty years old was he when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Jerusha, the daughter of Zadok.

chapters.zh: 约坦行耶和华眼中看为正的事，效法他父亲乌西雅一切所行的；
chapters.en: And he did right in the sight of the LORD: he did according to all that his father Uzziah had done.

chapters.zh: 只是邱坛还没有废去，百姓仍在那里献祭烧香。约坦建立耶和华殿的上门。
chapters.en: Howbeit the high places were not removed: the people sacrificed and burned incense still in the high places. He built the higher gate of the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 约坦其余的事，凡他所行的都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 在那些日子，耶和华才使亚兰王利汛和利玛利的儿子比加去攻击犹大。
chapters.en: In those days the LORD began to send against Judah Rezin the king of Syria, and Pekah the son of Remaliah.

chapters.zh: 约坦与他列祖同睡，葬在他祖大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子亚哈斯接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Ahaz his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 利玛利的儿子比加十七年，犹大王约坦的儿子亚哈斯登基。
chapters.en: In the seventeenth year of Pekah the son of Remaliah Ahaz the son of Jotham king of Judah began to reign.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年二十岁，在耶路撒冷作王十六年；不像他祖大卫行耶和华 ─ 他神眼中看为正的事，
chapters.en: Twenty years old Ahaz when he began to reign, and reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem, and did not right in the sight of the LORD his God, like David his father.

chapters.zh: 却效法以色列诸王所行的，又照著耶和华从以色列人面前赶出的外邦人所行可憎的事，使他的儿子经火，
chapters.en: But he walked in the way of the kings of Israel, yea, and made his son to pass through the fire, according to the abominations of the heathen, whom the LORD cast out from before the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 并在邱坛上、山冈上、各青翠树下献祭烧香。
chapters.en: And he sacrificed and burnt incense in the high places, and on the hills, and under every green tree.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王利汛和以色列王利玛利的儿子比加上来攻打耶路撒冷，围困亚哈斯，却不能胜他。
chapters.en: Then Rezin king of Syria and Pekah son of Remaliah king of Israel came up to Jerusalem to war: and they besieged Ahaz, but could not overcome .

chapters.zh: 当时亚兰王利汛收回以拉他归与亚兰，将犹大人从以拉他赶出去。亚兰人 ( 有作以东人的 ) 就来到以拉他，住在那里，直到今日。
chapters.en: At that time Rezin king of Syria recovered Elath to Syria, and drave the Jews from Elath: and the Syrians came to Elath, and dwelt there unto this day.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯差遣使者去见亚述王提革拉毗列色，说：我是你的仆人、你的儿子。现在亚兰王和以色列王攻击我，求你来救我脱离他们的手。
chapters.en: So Ahaz sent messengers to Tiglathpileser king of Assyria, saying, I thy servant and thy son: come up, and save me out of the hand of the king of Syria, and out of the hand of the king of Israel, which rise up against me.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯将耶和华殿里和王宫府库里所有的金银都送给亚述王为礼物。
chapters.en: And Ahaz took the silver and gold that was found in the house of the LORD, and in the treasures of the king's house, and sent a present to the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 亚述王应允了他，就上去攻打大马色，将城攻取，杀了利汛，把居民掳到吉珥。
chapters.en: And the king of Assyria hearkened unto him: for the king of Assyria went up against Damascus, and took it, and carried it captive to Kir, and slew Rezin.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯王上大马色去迎接亚述王提革拉毗列色，在大马色看见一座坛，就照坛的规模样式作法画了图样，送到祭司乌利亚那里。
chapters.en: And king Ahaz went to Damascus to meet Tiglathpileser king of Assyria, and saw an altar that at Damascus: and king Ahaz sent to Urijah the priest the fashion of the altar, and the pattern of it, according to all the workmanship thereof.

chapters.zh: 祭司乌利亚照著亚哈斯王从大马色送来的图样，在亚哈斯王没有从大马色回来之先，建筑一座坛。
chapters.en: And Urijah the priest built an altar according to all that king Ahaz had sent from Damascus: so Urijah the priest made against king Ahaz came from Damascus.

chapters.zh: 王从大马色回来看见坛，就近前来，在坛上献祭；
chapters.en: And when the king was come from Damascus, the king saw the altar: and the king approached to the altar, and offered thereon.

chapters.zh: 烧燔祭、素祭、浇奠祭，将平安祭牲的血洒在坛上，
chapters.en: And he burnt his burnt offering and his meat offering, and poured his drink offering, and sprinkled the blood of his peace offerings, upon the altar.

chapters.zh: 又将耶和华面前的铜坛从耶和华殿和新坛的中间搬到新坛的北边。
chapters.en: And he brought also the brasen altar, which before the LORD, from the forefront of the house, from between the altar and the house of the LORD, and put it on the north side of the altar.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯王吩咐祭司乌利亚说：早晨的燔祭、晚上的素祭，王的燔祭、素祭，国内众民的燔祭、素祭、奠祭都要烧在大坛上。燔祭牲和平安祭牲的血也要洒在这坛上，只是铜坛我要用以求问耶和华。
chapters.en: And king Ahaz commanded Urijah the priest, saying, Upon the great altar burn the morning burnt offering, and the evening meat offering, and the king's burnt sacrifice, and his meat offering, with the burnt offering of all the people of the land, and their meat offering, and their drink offerings; and sprinkle upon it all the blood of the burnt offering, and all the blood of the sacrifice: and the brasen altar shall be for me to enquire .

chapters.zh: 祭司乌利亚就照著亚哈斯王所吩咐的行了。
chapters.en: Thus did Urijah the priest, according to all that king Ahaz commanded.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯王打掉盆座四面镶著的心子，把盆从座上挪下来，又将铜海从驮海的铜牛上搬下来，放在铺石地；
chapters.en: And king Ahaz cut off the borders of the bases, and removed the laver from off them; and took down the sea from off the brasen oxen that under it, and put it upon a pavement of stones.

chapters.zh: 又因亚述王的缘故，将耶和华殿为安息日所盖的廊子和王从外入殿的廊子挪移，围绕耶和华的殿。
chapters.en: And the covert for the sabbath that they had built in the house, and the king's entry without, turned he from the house of the LORD for the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯其余所行的事都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaz which he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 亚哈斯与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子希西家接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Ahaz slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David: and Hezekiah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚哈斯十二年，以拉的儿子何细亚在撒玛利亚登基作以色列王九年。
chapters.en: In the twelfth year of Ahaz king of Judah began Hoshea the son of Elah to reign in Samaria over Israel nine years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，只是不像在他以前的以色列诸王。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, but not as the kings of Israel that were before him.

chapters.zh: 亚述王撒缦以色上来攻击何细亚，何细亚就服事他，给他进贡。
chapters.en: Against him came up Shalmaneser king of Assyria; and Hoshea became his servant, and gave him presents.

chapters.zh: 何细亚背叛，差人去见埃及王梭，不照往年所行的与亚述王进贡。亚述王知道了，就把他锁禁，囚在监里。
chapters.en: And the king of Assyria found conspiracy in Hoshea: for he had sent messengers to So king of Egypt, and brought no present to the king of Assyria, as year by year: therefore the king of Assyria shut him up, and bound him in prison.

chapters.zh: 亚述王上来攻击以色列遍地，上到撒玛利亚，围困三年。
chapters.en: Then the king of Assyria came up throughout all the land, and went up to Samaria, and besieged it three years.

chapters.zh: 何细亚第九年亚述王攻取了撒玛利亚，将以色列人掳到亚述，把他们安置在哈腊与歌散的哈博河边，并玛代人的城邑。
chapters.en: In the ninth year of Hoshea the king of Assyria took Samaria, and carried Israel away into Assyria, and placed them in Halah and in Habor the river of Gozan, and in the cities of the Medes.

chapters.zh: 这是因以色列人得罪那领他们出埃及地、脱离埃及王法老手的耶和华 ─ 他们的神，去敬畏别神，
chapters.en: For it was, that the children of Israel had sinned against the LORD their God, which had brought them up out of the land of Egypt, from under the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt, and had feared other gods,

chapters.zh: 随从耶和华在他们面前所赶出外邦人的风俗和以色列诸王所立的条规。
chapters.en: And walked in the statutes of the heathen, whom the LORD cast out from before the children of Israel, and of the kings of Israel, which they had made.

chapters.zh: 以色列人暗中行不正的事，违背耶和华 ─ 他们的神，在他们所有的城邑，从瞭望楼直到坚固城，建筑邱坛；
chapters.en: And the children of Israel did secretly things that not right against the LORD their God, and they built them high places in all their cities, from the tower of the watchmen to the fenced city.

chapters.zh: 在各高冈上、各青翠树下立柱像和木偶；
chapters.en: And they set them up images and groves in every high hill, and under every green tree:

chapters.zh: 在邱坛上烧香，效法耶和华在他们面前赶出的外邦人所行的，又行恶事惹动耶和华的怒气；
chapters.en: And there they burnt incense in all the high places, as the heathen whom the LORD carried away before them; and wrought wicked things to provoke the LORD to anger:

chapters.zh: 且事奉偶像，就是耶和华警戒他们不可行的。
chapters.en: For they served idols, whereof the LORD had said unto them, Ye shall not do this thing.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华藉众先知、先见劝戒以色列人和犹大人说：当离开你们的恶行，谨守我的诫命律例，遵行我吩咐你们列祖，并藉我仆人众先知所传给你们的律法。
chapters.en: Yet the LORD testified against Israel, and against Judah, by all the prophets, all the seers, saying, Turn ye from your evil ways, and keep my commandments my statutes, according to all the law which I commanded your fathers, and which I sent to you by my servants the prophets.

chapters.zh: 他们却不听从，竟硬著颈项，效法他们列祖，不信服耶和华 ─ 他们的神，
chapters.en: Notwithstanding they would not hear, but hardened their necks, like to the neck of their fathers, that did not believe in the LORD their God.

chapters.zh: 厌弃他的律例和他与他们列祖所立的约，并劝戒他们的话，随从虚无的神，自己成为虚妄，效法周围的外邦人，就是耶和华嘱咐他们不可效法的；
chapters.en: And they rejected his statutes, and his covenant that he made with their fathers, and his testimonies which he testified against them; and they followed vanity, and became vain, and went after the heathen that round about them, whom the LORD had charged them, that they should not do like them.

chapters.zh: 离弃耶和华 ─ 他们神的一切诫命，为自己铸了两个牛犊的像，立了亚舍拉，敬拜天上的万象，事奉巴力，
chapters.en: And they left all the commandments of the LORD their God, and made them molten images, two calves, and made a grove, and worshipped all the host of heaven, and served Baal.

chapters.zh: 又使他们的儿女经火，用占卜，行法术卖了自己，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，惹动他的怒气。
chapters.en: And they caused their sons and their daughters to pass through the fire, and used divination and enchantments, and sold themselves to do evil in the sight of the LORD, to provoke him to anger.

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华向以色列人大大发怒，从自己面前赶出他们，只剩下犹大一个支派。
chapters.en: Therefore the LORD was very angry with Israel, and removed them out of his sight: there was none left but the tribe of Judah only.

chapters.zh: 犹大人也不遵守耶和华 ─ 他们神的诫命，随从以色列人所立的条规。
chapters.en: Also Judah kept not the commandments of the LORD their God, but walked in the statutes of Israel which they made.

chapters.zh: 耶和华就厌弃以色列全族，使他们受苦，把他们交在抢夺他们的人手中，以致赶出他们离开自己面前，
chapters.en: And the LORD rejected all the seed of Israel, and afflicted them, and delivered them into the hand of spoilers, until he had cast them out of his sight.

chapters.zh: 将以色列国从大卫家夺回；他们就立尼八的儿子耶罗波安作王。耶罗波安引诱以色列人不随从耶和华，陷在大罪里。
chapters.en: For he rent Israel from the house of David; and they made Jeroboam the son of Nebat king: and Jeroboam drave Israel from following the LORD, and made them sin a great sin.

chapters.zh: 以色列人犯耶罗波安所犯的一切罪，总不离开，
chapters.en: For the children of Israel walked in all the sins of Jeroboam which he did; they departed not from them;

chapters.zh: 以致耶和华从自己面前赶出他们，正如藉他仆人众先知所说的。这样，以色列人从本地被掳到亚述，直到今日。
chapters.en: Until the LORD removed Israel out of his sight, as he had said by all his servants the prophets. So was Israel carried away out of their own land to Assyria unto this day.

chapters.zh: 亚述王从巴比伦、古他、亚瓦、哈马，和西法瓦音迁移人来，安置在撒玛利亚的城邑，代替以色列人；他们就得了撒玛利亚，住在其中。
chapters.en: And the king of Assyria brought from Babylon, and from Cuthah, and from Ava, and from Hamath, and from Sepharvaim, and placed in the cities of Samaria instead of the children of Israel: and they possessed Samaria, and dwelt in the cities thereof.

chapters.zh: 他们才住那里的时候，不敬畏耶和华，所以耶和华叫狮子进入他们中间，咬死了些人。
chapters.en: And it was at the beginning of their dwelling there, they feared not the LORD: therefore the LORD sent lions among them, which slew of them.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉亚述王说：你所迁移安置在撒玛利亚各城的那些民，不知道那地之神的规矩，所以那神叫狮子进入他们中间，咬死他们。
chapters.en: Wherefore they spake to the king of Assyria, saying, The nations which thou hast removed, and placed in the cities of Samaria, know not the manner of the God of the land: therefore he hath sent lions among them, and, behold, they slay them, because they know not the manner of the God of the land.

chapters.zh: 亚述王就吩咐说：叫所掳来的祭司回去一个，使他住在那里，将那地之神的规矩指教那些民。
chapters.en: Then the king of Assyria commanded, saying, Carry thither one of the priests whom ye brought from thence; and let them go and dwell there, and let him teach them the manner of the God of the land.

chapters.zh: 于是有一个从撒玛利亚掳去的祭司回来，住在伯特利，指教他们怎样敬畏耶和华。
chapters.en: Then one of the priests whom they had carried away from Samaria came and dwelt in Bethel, and taught them how they should fear the LORD.

chapters.zh: 然而，各族之人在所住的城里各为自己制造神像，安置在撒玛利亚人所造有邱坛的殿中。
chapters.en: Howbeit every nation made gods of their own, and put in the houses of the high places which the Samaritans had made, every nation in their cities wherein they dwelt.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦人造疏割 • 比讷像；古他人造匿甲像；哈马人造亚示玛像；
chapters.en: And the men of Babylon made Succothbenoth, and the men of Cuth made Nergal, and the men of Hamath made Ashima,

chapters.zh: 亚瓦人造匿哈和他珥他像；西法瓦音人用火焚烧儿女，献给西法瓦音的神亚得米勒和亚拿米勒。
chapters.en: And the Avites made Nibhaz and Tartak, and the Sepharvites burnt their children in fire to Adrammelech and Anammelech, the gods of Sepharvaim.

chapters.zh: 他们惧怕耶和华，也从他们中间立邱坛的祭司，为他们在有邱坛的殿中献祭。
chapters.en: So they feared the LORD, and made unto themselves of the lowest of them priests of the high places, which sacrificed for them in the houses of the high places.

chapters.zh: 他们又惧怕耶和华，又事奉自己的神，从何邦迁移，就随何邦的风俗。
chapters.en: They feared the LORD, and served their own gods, after the manner of the nations whom they carried away from thence.

chapters.zh: 他们直到如今仍照先前的风俗去行，不专心敬畏耶和华，不全守自己的规矩、典章，也不遵守耶和华吩咐雅各后裔的律法、诫命。〈 雅各，就是从前耶和华起名叫以色列的。〉
chapters.en: Unto this day they do after the former manners: they fear not the LORD, neither do they after their statutes, or after their ordinances, or after the law and commandment which the LORD commanded the children of Jacob, whom he named Israel;

chapters.zh: 耶和华曾与他们立约，嘱咐他们说：不可敬畏别神，不可跪拜事奉他，也不可向他献祭。
chapters.en: With whom the LORD had made a covenant, and charged them, saying, Ye shall not fear other gods, nor bow yourselves to them, nor serve them, nor sacrifice to them:

chapters.zh: 但那用大能和伸出来的膀臂领你们出埃及地的耶和华，你们当敬畏，跪拜，向他献祭。
chapters.en: But the LORD, who brought you up out of the land of Egypt with great power and a stretched out arm, him shall ye fear, and him shall ye worship, and to him shall ye do sacrifice.

chapters.zh: 他给你们写的律例、典章、律法、诫命，你们应当永远谨守遵行，不可敬畏别神。
chapters.en: And the statutes, and the ordinances, and the law, and the commandment, which he wrote for you, ye shall observe to do for evermore; and ye shall not fear other gods.

chapters.zh: 我 ─ 耶和华与你们所立的约你们不可忘记，也不可敬畏别神。
chapters.en: And the covenant that I have made with you ye shall not forget; neither shall ye fear other gods.

chapters.zh: 但要敬畏耶和华 ─ 你们的神，他必救你们脱离一切仇敌的手。
chapters.en: But the LORD your God ye shall fear; and he shall deliver you out of the hand of all your enemies.

chapters.zh: 他们却不听从，仍照先前的风俗去行。
chapters.en: Howbeit they did not hearken, but they did after their former manner.

chapters.zh: 如此这些民又惧怕耶和华，又事奉他们的偶像。他们子子孙孙也都照样行，效法他们的祖宗，直到今日。
chapters.en: So these nations feared the LORD, and served their graven images, both their children, and their children's children: as did their fathers, so do they unto this day.

chapters.zh: 以色列王以拉的儿子何细亚第三年，犹大王亚哈斯的儿子希西家登基。
chapters.en: Now it came to pass in the third year of Hoshea son of Elah king of Israel, Hezekiah the son of Ahaz king of Judah began to reign.

chapters.zh: 他登基的时候年二十五岁，在耶路撒冷作王二十九年。他母亲名叫亚比，是撒迦利雅的女儿。
chapters.en: Twenty and five years old was he when he began to reign; and he reigned twenty and nine years in Jerusalem. His mother's name also Abi, the daughter of Zachariah.

chapters.zh: 希西家行耶和华眼中看为正的事，效法他祖大卫一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did right in the sight of the LORD, according to all that David his father did.

chapters.zh: 他废去邱坛，毁坏柱像，砍下木偶，打碎摩西所造的铜蛇，因为到那时以色列人仍向铜蛇烧香。希西家叫铜蛇为铜块 ( 或作人称铜蛇为铜像 )。
chapters.en: He removed the high places, and brake the images, and cut down the groves, and brake in pieces the brasen serpent that Moses had made: for unto those days the children of Israel did burn incense to it: and he called it Nehushtan.

chapters.zh: 希西家倚靠耶和华 ─ 以色列的神，在他前后的犹大列王中没有一个及他的。
chapters.en: He trusted in the LORD God of Israel; so that after him was none like him among all the kings of Judah, nor that were before him.

chapters.zh: 因为他专靠耶和华，总不离开，谨守耶和华所吩咐摩西的诫命。
chapters.en: For he clave to the LORD, departed not from following him, but kept his commandments, which the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 耶和华与他同在，他无论往何处去尽都亨通。他背叛、不肯事奉亚述王。
chapters.en: And the LORD was with him; he prospered whithersoever he went forth: and he rebelled against the king of Assyria, and served him not.

chapters.zh: 希西家攻击非利士人，直到迦萨，并迦萨的四境，从瞭望楼到坚固城。
chapters.en: He smote the Philistines, unto Gaza, and the borders thereof, from the tower of the watchmen to the fenced city.

chapters.zh: 希西家王第四年，就是以色列王以拉的儿子何细亚第七年，亚述王撒缦以色上来围困撒玛利亚；
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the fourth year of king Hezekiah, which the seventh year of Hoshea son of Elah king of Israel, Shalmaneser king of Assyria came up against Samaria, and besieged it.

chapters.zh: 过了三年就攻取了城。希西家第六年，以色列王何细亚第九年，撒玛利亚被攻取了。
chapters.en: And at the end of three years they took it: in the sixth year of Hezekiah, that the ninth year of Hoshea king of Israel, Samaria was taken.

chapters.zh: 亚述王将以色列人掳到亚述，把他们安置在哈腊与歌散的哈博河边，并玛代人的城邑；
chapters.en: And the king of Assyria did carry away Israel unto Assyria, and put them in Halah and in Habor the river of Gozan, and in the cities of the Medes:

chapters.zh: 都因他们不听从耶和华 ─ 他们神的话，违背他的约，就是耶和华仆人摩西吩咐他们所当守的。
chapters.en: Because they obeyed not the voice of the LORD their God, but transgressed his covenant, all that Moses the servant of the LORD commanded, and would not hear , nor do .

chapters.zh: 希西家王十四年，亚述王西拿基立上来攻击犹大的一切坚固城，将城攻取。
chapters.en: Now in the fourteenth year of king Hezekiah did Sennacherib king of Assyria come up against all the fenced cities of Judah, and took them.

chapters.zh: 犹大王希西家差人往拉吉去见亚述王，说：我有罪了，求你离开我；凡你罚我的，我必承当。于是亚述王罚犹大王希西家银子三百他连得，金子三十他连得。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah king of Judah sent to the king of Assyria to Lachish, saying, I have offended; return from me: that which thou puttest on me will I bear. And the king of Assyria appointed unto Hezekiah king of Judah three hundred talents of silver and thirty talents of gold.

chapters.zh: 希西家就把耶和华殿里和王宫府库里所有的银子都给了他。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah gave all the silver that was found in the house of the LORD, and in the treasures of the king's house.

chapters.zh: 那时，犹大王希西家将耶和华殿门上的金子和他自己包在柱上的金子都刮下来，给了亚述王。
chapters.en: At that time did Hezekiah cut off the doors of the temple of the LORD, and the pillars which Hezekiah king of Judah had overlaid, and gave it to the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 亚述王从拉吉差遣他珥探、拉伯撒利，和拉伯沙基率领大军往耶路撒冷，到希西家王那里去。他们上到耶路撒冷，就站在上池的水沟旁，在漂布地的大路上。
chapters.en: And the king of Assyria sent Tartan and Rabsaris and Rabshakeh from Lachish to king Hezekiah with a great host against Jerusalem. And they went up and came to Jerusalem. And when they were come up, they came and stood by the conduit of the upper pool, which in the highway of the fuller's field.

chapters.zh: 他们呼叫王的时候，就有希勒家的儿子家宰以利亚敬，并书记舍伯那和亚萨的儿子史官约亚，出来见他们。
chapters.en: And when they had called to the king, there came out to them Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, which over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and Joah the son of Asaph the recorder.

chapters.zh: 拉伯沙基说：你们去告诉希西家说，亚述大王如此说：你所倚靠的有甚么可仗赖的呢？
chapters.en: And Rabshakeh said unto them, Speak ye now to Hezekiah, Thus saith the great king, the king of Assyria, What confidence this wherein thou trustest?

chapters.zh: 你说有打仗的计谋和能力，我看不过是虚话。你到底倚靠谁才背叛我呢？
chapters.en: Thou sayest, (but vain words,) counsel and strength for the war. Now on whom dost thou trust, that thou rebellest against me?

chapters.zh: 看哪，你所倚靠的埃及是那压伤的苇杖；人若靠这杖，就必刺透他的手。埃及王法老向一切倚靠他的人也是这样。
chapters.en: Now, behold, thou trustest upon the staff of this bruised reed, upon Egypt, on which if a man lean, it will go into his hand, and pierce it: so Pharaoh king of Egypt unto all that trust on him.

chapters.zh: 你们若对我说：我们倚靠耶和华 ─ 我们的神，希西家岂不是将神的邱坛和祭坛废去，且对犹大和耶路撒冷的人说：你们当在耶路撒冷这坛前敬拜么？
chapters.en: But if ye say unto me, We trust in the LORD our God: not that he, whose high places and whose altars Hezekiah hath taken away, and hath said to Judah and Jerusalem, Ye shall worship before this altar in Jerusalem?

chapters.zh: 现在你把当头给我主亚述王，我给你二千匹马，看你这一面骑马的人够不够。
chapters.en: Now therefore, I pray thee, give pledges to my lord the king of Assyria, and I will deliver thee two thousand horses, if thou be able on thy part to set riders upon them.

chapters.zh: 若不然，怎能打败我主臣仆中最小的军长呢？你竟倚靠埃及的战车马兵么？
chapters.en: How then wilt thou turn away the face of one captain of the least of my master's servants, and put thy trust on Egypt for chariots and for horsemen?

chapters.zh: 现在我上来攻击毁灭这地，岂没有耶和华的意思么？耶和华吩咐我说：你上去攻击毁灭这地罢！
chapters.en: Am I now come up without the LORD against this place to destroy it? The LORD said to me, Go up against this land, and destroy it.

chapters.zh: 希勒家的儿子以利亚敬和舍伯那，并约亚，对拉伯沙基说：求你用亚兰言语和仆人说话，因为我们懂得；不要用犹大言语和我们说话，达到城上百姓的耳中。
chapters.en: Then said Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, and Shebna, and Joah, unto Rabshakeh, Speak, I pray thee, to thy servants in the Syrian language; for we understand : and talk not with us in the Jews' language in the ears of the people that on the wall.

chapters.zh: 拉伯沙基说：我主差遣我来，岂是单对你和你的主说这些话么？不也是对这些坐在城上、要与你们一同吃自己粪、喝自己尿的人说么？
chapters.en: But Rabshakeh said unto them, Hath my master sent me to thy master, and to thee, to speak these words? not to the men which sit on the wall, that they may eat their own dung, and drink their own piss with you?

chapters.zh: 于是拉伯沙基站著，用犹大言语大声喊著说：你们当听亚述大王的话！
chapters.en: Then Rabshakeh stood and cried with a loud voice in the Jews' language, and spake, saying, Hear the word of the great king, the king of Assyria:

chapters.zh: 王如此说：你们不要被希西家欺哄了；因他不能救你们脱离我的手。
chapters.en: Thus saith the king, Let not Hezekiah deceive you: for he shall not be able to deliver you out of his hand:

chapters.zh: 也不要听希西家使你们倚靠耶和华，说耶和华必要拯救我们，这城必不交在亚述王的手中。
chapters.en: Neither let Hezekiah make you trust in the LORD, saying, The LORD will surely deliver us, and this city shall not be delivered into the hand of the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 不要听希西家的话！因亚述王如此说：你们要与我和好，出来投降我，各人就可以吃自己葡萄树和无花果树的果子，喝自己井里的水。
chapters.en: Hearken not to Hezekiah: for thus saith the king of Assyria, Make with me by a present, and come out to me, and eat ye every man of his own vine, and every one of his fig tree, and drink ye every one the waters of his cistern:

chapters.zh: 等我来领你们到一个地方与你们本地一样，就是有五谷和新酒之地，有粮食和葡萄园之地，有橄榄树和蜂蜜之地，好使你们存活，不至于死。希西家劝导你们，说耶和华必拯救我们；你们不要听他的话。
chapters.en: Until I come and take you away to a land like your own land, a land of corn and wine, a land of bread and vineyards, a land of oil olive and of honey, that ye may live, and not die: and hearken not unto Hezekiah, when he persuadeth you, saying, The LORD will deliver us.

chapters.zh: 列国的神有哪一个救他本国脱离亚述王的手呢？
chapters.en: Hath any of the gods of the nations delivered at all his land out of the hand of the king of Assyria?

chapters.zh: 哈马、亚珥拔的神在哪里呢？西法瓦音、希拿、以瓦的神在哪里呢？他们曾救撒玛利亚脱离我的手么？
chapters.en: Where the gods of Hamath, and of Arpad? where the gods of Sepharvaim, Hena, and Ivah? have they delivered Samaria out of mine hand?

chapters.zh: 这些国的神有谁曾救自己的国脱离我的手呢？难道耶和华能救耶路撒冷脱离我的手么？
chapters.en: Who they among all the gods of the countries, that have delivered their country out of mine hand, that the LORD should deliver Jerusalem out of mine hand?

chapters.zh: 百姓静默不言，并不回答一句，因为王曾吩咐说：不要回答他。
chapters.en: But the people held their peace, and answered him not a word: for the king's commandment was, saying, Answer him not.

chapters.zh: 当下，希勒家的儿子家宰以利亚敬和书记舍伯那，并亚萨的儿子史官约亚，都撕裂衣服，来到希西家那里，将拉伯沙基的话告诉了他。
chapters.en: Then came Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, which over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and Joah the son of Asaph the recorder, to Hezekiah with clothes rent, and told him the words of Rabshakeh.

chapters.zh: 希西家王听见，就撕裂衣服，披上麻布，进了耶和华的殿；
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when king Hezekiah heard , that he rent his clothes, and covered himself with sackcloth, and went into the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 使家宰以利亚敬和书记舍伯那，并祭司中的长老，都披上麻布，去见亚摩斯的儿子先知以赛亚，
chapters.en: And he sent Eliakim, which over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and the elders of the priests, covered with sackcloth, to Isaiah the prophet the son of Amoz.

chapters.zh: 对他说：希西家如此说：今日是急难、责罚、凌辱的日子，就如妇人将要生产婴孩，却没有力量生产。
chapters.en: And they said unto him, Thus saith Hezekiah, This day a day of trouble, and of rebuke, and blasphemy: for the children are come to the birth, and not strength to bring forth.

chapters.zh: 或者耶和华 ─ 你的神听见拉伯沙基的一切话，就是他主人亚述王打发他来辱骂永生神的话，耶和华 ─ 你的神听见这话，就发斥责。故此，求你为余剩的民扬声祷告。
chapters.en: It may be the LORD thy God will hear all the words of Rabshakeh, whom the king of Assyria his master hath sent to reproach the living God; and will reprove the words which the LORD thy God hath heard: wherefore lift up prayer for the remnant that are left.

chapters.zh: 希西家王的臣仆就去见以赛亚。
chapters.en: So the servants of king Hezekiah came to Isaiah.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚对他们说：要这样对你们的主人说，耶和华如此说：你听见亚述王的仆人亵渎我的话，不要惧怕。
chapters.en: And Isaiah said unto them, Thus shall ye say to your master, Thus saith the LORD, Be not afraid of the words which thou hast heard, with which the servants of the king of Assyria have blasphemed me.

chapters.zh: 我必惊动 ( 原文作使灵进入 ) 他的心，他要听见风声就归回本地。我必使他在那里倒在刀下。
chapters.en: Behold, I will send a blast upon him, and he shall hear a rumour, and shall return to his own land; and I will cause him to fall by the sword in his own land.

chapters.zh: 拉伯沙基回去，正遇见亚述王攻打立拿，原来他早听见亚述王拔营离开拉吉。
chapters.en: So Rabshakeh returned, and found the king of Assyria warring against Libnah: for he had heard that he was departed from Lachish.

chapters.zh: 亚述王听见人论古实王特哈加说：他出来要与你争战。于是亚述王又打发使者去见希西家，吩咐他们说：
chapters.en: And when he heard say of Tirhakah king of Ethiopia, Behold, he is come out to fight against thee: he sent messengers again unto Hezekiah, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们对犹大王希西家如此说：不要听你所倚靠的神欺哄你，说耶路撒冷必不交在亚述王的手中。
chapters.en: Thus shall ye speak to Hezekiah king of Judah, saying, Let not thy God in whom thou trustest deceive thee, saying, Jerusalem shall not be delivered into the hand of the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 你总听说亚述诸王向列国所行的，乃是尽行灭绝，难道你还能得救么？
chapters.en: Behold, thou hast heard what the kings of Assyria have done to all lands, by destroying them utterly: and shalt thou be delivered?

chapters.zh: 我列祖所毁灭的，就是歌散、哈兰、利色，和属提 • 拉撒的伊甸人，这些国的神何曾拯救这些国呢？
chapters.en: Have the gods of the nations delivered them which my fathers have destroyed; Gozan, and Haran, and Rezeph, and the children of Eden which in Thelasar?

chapters.zh: 哈马的王、亚珥拔的王、西法瓦音城的王、希拿，和以瓦的王都在哪里呢？
chapters.en: Where the king of Hamath, and the king of Arpad, and the king of the city of Sepharvaim, of Hena, and Ivah?

chapters.zh: 希西家从使者手里接过书信来，看完了，就上耶和华的殿，将书信在耶和华面前展开。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah received the letter of the hand of the messengers, and read it: and Hezekiah went up into the house of the LORD, and spread it before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 希西家向耶和华祷告说：坐在二基路伯上耶和华 ─ 以色列的神啊，你是天下万国的神，你曾创造天地。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah prayed before the LORD, and said, O LORD God of Israel, which dwellest the cherubims, thou art the God, thou alone, of all the kingdoms of the earth; thou hast made heaven and earth.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你侧耳而听！耶和华啊，求你睁眼而看！要听西拿基立打发使者来辱骂永生神的话。
chapters.en: LORD, bow down thine ear, and hear: open, LORD, thine eyes, and see: and hear the words of Sennacherib, which hath sent him to reproach the living God.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，亚述诸王果然使列国和列国之地变为荒凉，
chapters.en: Of a truth, LORD, the kings of Assyria have destroyed the nations and their lands,

chapters.zh: 将列国的神像都扔在火里；因为他本不是神，乃是人手所造的，是木头石头的，所以灭绝他。
chapters.en: And have cast their gods into the fire: for they no gods, but the work of men's hands, wood and stone: therefore they have destroyed them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 我们的神啊，现在求你救我们脱离亚述王的手，使天下万国都知道惟独你 ─ 耶和华是神！
chapters.en: Now therefore, O LORD our God, I beseech thee, save thou us out of his hand, that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that thou the LORD God, thou only.

chapters.zh: 亚摩斯的儿子以赛亚就打发人去见希西家，说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你既然求我攻击亚述王西拿基立，我已听见了。
chapters.en: Then Isaiah the son of Amoz sent to Hezekiah, saying, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, which thou hast prayed to me against Sennacherib king of Assyria I have heard.

chapters.zh: 耶和华论他这样说：锡安的处女藐视你，嗤笑你；耶路撒冷的女子向你摇头。
chapters.en: This the word that the LORD hath spoken concerning him; The virgin the daughter of Zion hath despised thee, laughed thee to scorn; the daughter of Jerusalem hath shaken her head at thee.

chapters.zh: 你辱骂谁？亵渎谁？扬起声来，高举眼目攻击谁呢？乃是攻击以色列的圣者！
chapters.en: Whom hast thou reproached and blasphemed? and against whom hast thou exalted voice, and lifted up thine eyes on high? against the Holy of Israel.

chapters.zh: 你藉你的使者辱骂主，并说：我率领许多战车上山顶，到利巴嫩极深之处；我要砍伐其中高大的香柏树和佳美的松树；我必上极高之处，进入肥田的树林。
chapters.en: By thy messengers thou hast reproached the Lord, and hast said, With the multitude of my chariots I am come up to the height of the mountains, to the sides of Lebanon, and will cut down the tall cedar trees thereof, the choice fir trees thereof: and I will enter into the lodgings of his borders, the forest of his Carmel.

chapters.zh: 我已经在外邦挖井喝水；我必用脚掌踏干埃及的一切河。
chapters.en: I have digged and drunk strange waters, and with the sole of my feet have I dried up all the rivers of besieged places.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说，我早先所做的，古时所立的，就是现在藉你使坚固城荒废，变为乱堆，这事你岂没有听见么？
chapters.en: Hast thou not heard long ago I have done it, of ancient times that I have formed it? now have I brought it to pass, that thou shouldest be to lay waste fenced cities ruinous heaps.

chapters.zh: 所以其中的居民力量甚小，惊惶羞愧。他们像野草，像青菜，如房顶上的草，又如未长成而枯干的禾稼。
chapters.en: Therefore their inhabitants were of small power, they were dismayed and confounded; they were the grass of the field, and the green herb, the grass on the housetops, and blasted before it be grown up.

chapters.zh: 你坐下，你出去，你进来，你向我发烈怒，我都知道。
chapters.en: But I know thy abode, and thy going out, and thy coming in, and thy rage against me.

chapters.zh: 因你向我发烈怒，又因你狂傲的话达到我耳中，我就要用钩子钩上你的鼻子，把嚼环放在你口里，使你从你来的路转回去。
chapters.en: Because thy rage against me and thy tumult is come up into mine ears, therefore I will put my hook in thy nose, and my bridle in thy lips, and I will turn thee back by the way by which thou camest.

chapters.zh: 以色列人哪，我赐你们一个证据：你们今年要吃自生的，明年也要吃自长的；至于后年，你们要耕种收割，栽植葡萄园，吃其中的果子。
chapters.en: And this a sign unto thee, Ye shall eat this year such things as grow of themselves, and in the second year that which springeth of the same; and in the third year sow ye, and reap, and plant vineyards, and eat the fruits thereof.

chapters.zh: 犹大家所逃脱余剩的，仍要往下扎根，向上结果。
chapters.en: And the remnant that is escaped of the house of Judah shall yet again take root downward, and bear fruit upward.

chapters.zh: 必有余剩的民从耶路撒冷而出；必有逃脱的人从锡安山而来。耶和华的热心必成就这事。
chapters.en: For out of Jerusalem shall go forth a remnant, and they that escape out of mount Zion: the zeal of the LORD shall do this.

chapters.zh: 所以，耶和华论亚述王如此说：他必不得来到这城，也不在这里射箭，不得拿盾牌到城前，也不筑垒攻城。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD concerning the king of Assyria, He shall not come into this city, nor shoot an arrow there, nor come before it with shield, nor cast a bank against it.

chapters.zh: 他从哪条路来，必从那条路回去，必不得来到这城。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: By the way that he came, by the same shall he return, and shall not come into this city, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 因我为自己的缘故，又为我仆人大卫的缘故，必保护拯救这城。
chapters.en: For I will defend this city, to save it, for mine own sake, and for my servant David's sake.

chapters.zh: 当夜，耶和华的使者出去，在亚述营中杀了十八万五千人。清早有人起来，一看，都是死尸了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass that night, that the angel of the LORD went out, and smote in the camp of the Assyrians an hundred fourscore and five thousand: and when they arose early in the morning, behold, they all dead corpses.

chapters.zh: 亚述王西拿基立就拔营回去，住在尼尼微。
chapters.en: So Sennacherib king of Assyria departed, and went and returned, and dwelt at Nineveh.

chapters.zh: 一日在他的神尼斯洛庙里叩拜，他儿子亚得米勒和沙利色用刀杀了他，就逃到亚拉腊地。他儿子以撒哈顿接续他作王。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as he was worshipping in the house of Nisroch his god, that Adrammelech and Sharezer his sons smote him with the sword: and they escaped into the land of Armenia. And Esarhaddon his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 那时，希西家病得要死。亚摩斯的儿子先知以赛亚去见他，对他说：耶和华如此说：你当留遗命与你的家，因为你必死，不能活了。
chapters.en: In those days was Hezekiah sick unto death. And the prophet Isaiah the son of Amoz came to him, and said unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Set thine house in order; for thou shalt die, and not live.

chapters.zh: 希西家就转脸朝墙，祷告耶和华说：
chapters.en: Then he turned his face to the wall, and prayed unto the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你记念我在你面前怎样存完全的心，按诚实行事，又做你眼中所看为善的。希西家就痛哭了。
chapters.en: I beseech thee, O LORD, remember now how I have walked before thee in truth and with a perfect heart, and have done good in thy sight. And Hezekiah wept sore.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚出来，还没有到中院 ( 院或作城 )，耶和华的话就临到他，说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass, afore Isaiah was gone out into the middle court, that the word of the LORD came to him, saying,

chapters.zh: 你回去告诉我民的君希西家说：耶和华 ─ 你祖大卫的神如此说：我听见了你的祷告，看见了你的眼泪，我必医治你；到第三日，你必上到耶和华的殿。
chapters.en: Turn again, and tell Hezekiah the captain of my people, Thus saith the LORD, the God of David thy father, I have heard thy prayer, I have seen thy tears: behold, I will heal thee: on the third day thou shalt go up unto the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我必加增你十五年的寿数，并且我要救你和这城脱离亚述王的手。我为自己和我仆人大卫的缘故，必保护这城。
chapters.en: And I will add unto thy days fifteen years; and I will deliver thee and this city out of the hand of the king of Assyria; and I will defend this city for mine own sake, and for my servant David's sake.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚说：当取一块无花果饼来。人就取了来，贴在疮上，王便痊愈了。
chapters.en: And Isaiah said, Take a lump of figs. And they took and laid on the boil, and he recovered.

chapters.zh: 希西家问以赛亚说：耶和华必医治我，到第三日，我能上耶和华的殿，有甚么兆头呢？
chapters.en: And Hezekiah said unto Isaiah, What the sign that the LORD will heal me, and that I shall go up into the house of the LORD the third day?

chapters.zh: 以赛亚说：耶和华必成就他所说的。这是他给你的兆头：你要日影向前进十度呢？是要往后退十度呢？
chapters.en: And Isaiah said, This sign shalt thou have of the LORD, that the LORD will do the thing that he hath spoken: shall the shadow go forward ten degrees, or go back ten degrees?

chapters.zh: 希西家回答说：日影向前进十度容易，我要日影往后退十度。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah answered, It is a light thing for the shadow to go down ten degrees: nay, but let the shadow return backward ten degrees.

chapters.zh: 先知以赛亚求告耶和华，耶和就使亚哈斯的日晷向前进的日影，往后退了十度。
chapters.en: And Isaiah the prophet cried unto the LORD: and he brought the shadow ten degrees backward, by which it had gone down in the dial of Ahaz.

chapters.zh: 那时，巴比伦王巴拉但的儿子比罗达 • 巴拉但听见希西家病而痊愈，就送书信和礼物给他。
chapters.en: At that time Berodachbaladan, the son of Baladan, king of Babylon, sent letters and a present unto Hezekiah: for he had heard that Hezekiah had been sick.

chapters.zh: 希西家听从使者的话，就把他宝库的金子、银子、香料、贵重的膏油，和他武库的一切军器，并他所有的财宝，都给他们看。他家中和他全国之内，希西家没有一样不给他们看的。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah hearkened unto them, and shewed them all the house of his precious things, the silver, and the gold, and the spices, and the precious ointment, and the house of his armour, and all that was found in his treasures: there was nothing in his house, nor in all his dominion, that Hezekiah shewed them not.

chapters.zh: 于是先知以赛亚来见希西家王，问他说：这些人说甚么？他们从哪里来见你？希西家说：他们从远方的巴比伦来。
chapters.en: Then came Isaiah the prophet unto king Hezekiah, and said unto him, What said these men? and from whence came they unto thee? And Hezekiah said, They are come from a far country, from Babylon.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚说：他们在你家里看见了甚么？希西家说：凡我家中所有的，他们都看见了；我财宝中没有一样不给他们看的。
chapters.en: And he said, What have they seen in thine house? And Hezekiah answered, All that in mine house have they seen: there is nothing among my treasures that I have not shewed them.

chapters.zh: 以赛亚对希西家说：你要听耶和华的话，
chapters.en: And Isaiah said unto Hezekiah, Hear the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 日子必到，凡你家里所有的，并你列祖积蓄到如今的，都要被掳到巴比伦去，不留下一样。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Behold, the days come, that all that in thine house, and that which thy fathers have laid up in store unto this day, shall be carried into Babylon: nothing shall be left, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 并且从你本身所生的众子，其中必有被掳去在巴比伦王宫里当太监的。
chapters.en: And of thy sons that shall issue from thee, which thou shalt beget, shall they take away; and they shall be eunuchs in the palace of the king of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 希西家对以赛亚说：你所说耶和华的话甚好！若在我的年日中有太平和稳固的景况，岂不是好么？
chapters.en: Then said Hezekiah unto Isaiah, Good the word of the LORD which thou hast spoken. And he said, not , if peace and truth be in my days?

chapters.zh: 希西家其余的事和他的勇力，他怎样挖池、挖沟、引水入城，都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Hezekiah, and all his might, and how he made a pool, and a conduit, and brought water into the city, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 希西家与他列祖同睡。他儿子玛拿西接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Hezekiah slept with his fathers: and Manasseh his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西登基的时候年十二岁，在耶路撒冷作王五十五年。他母亲名叫协西巴。
chapters.en: Manasseh twelve years old when he began to reign, and reigned fifty and five years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Hephzibah.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法耶和华在以色列人面前赶出的外邦人所行可憎的事。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, after the abominations of the heathen, whom the LORD cast out before the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 重新建筑他父希西家所毁坏的邱坛，又为巴力筑坛，做亚舍拉像，效法以色列王亚哈所行的，且敬拜事奉天上的万象；
chapters.en: For he built up again the high places which Hezekiah his father had destroyed; and he reared up altars for Baal, and made a grove, as did Ahab king of Israel; and worshipped all the host of heaven, and served them.

chapters.zh: 在耶和华殿宇中筑坛。耶和华曾指著这殿说：我必立我的名在耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: And he built altars in the house of the LORD, of which the LORD said, In Jerusalem will I put my name.

chapters.zh: 他在耶和华殿的两院中为天上的万象筑坛，
chapters.en: And he built altars for all the host of heaven in the two courts of the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 并使他的儿子经火，又观兆，用法术，立交鬼的和行巫术的，多行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，惹动他的怒气；
chapters.en: And he made his son pass through the fire, and observed times, and used enchantments, and dealt with familiar spirits and wizards: he wrought much wickedness in the sight of the LORD, to provoke to anger.

chapters.zh: 又在殿内立雕刻的亚舍拉像。耶和华曾对大卫和他儿子所罗门说：我在以色列众支派中所选择的耶路撒冷和这殿，必立我的名，直到永远。
chapters.en: And he set a graven image of the grove that he had made in the house, of which the LORD said to David, and to Solomon his son, In this house, and in Jerusalem, which I have chosen out of all tribes of Israel, will I put my name for ever:

chapters.zh: 以色列人若谨守遵行我一切所吩咐他们的和我仆人摩西所吩咐他们的一切律法，我就不再使他们挪移离开我所赐给他们列祖之地。
chapters.en: Neither will I make the feet of Israel move any more out of the land which I gave their fathers; only if they will observe to do according to all that I have commanded them, and according to all the law that my servant Moses commanded them.

chapters.zh: 他们却不听从。玛拿西引诱他们行恶，比耶和华在以色列人面前所灭的列国更甚。
chapters.en: But they hearkened not: and Manasseh seduced them to do more evil than did the nations whom the LORD destroyed before the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华藉他仆人众先知说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake by his servants the prophets, saying,

chapters.zh: 因犹大王玛拿西行这些可憎的恶事比先前亚摩利人所行的更甚，使犹大人拜他的偶像，陷在罪里；
chapters.en: Because Manasseh king of Judah hath done these abominations, hath done wickedly above all that the Amorites did, which before him, and hath made Judah also to sin with his idols:

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必降祸与耶路撒冷和犹大，叫一切听见的人无不耳鸣。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Behold, I bringing evil upon Jerusalem and Judah, that whosoever heareth of it, both his ears shall tingle.

chapters.zh: 我必用量撒玛利亚的准绳和亚哈家的线铊拉在耶路撒冷上，必擦净耶路撒冷，如人擦盘，将盘倒扣。
chapters.en: And I will stretch over Jerusalem the line of Samaria, and the plummet of the house of Ahab: and I will wipe Jerusalem as wipeth a dish, wiping , and turning upside down.

chapters.zh: 我必弃掉所余剩的子民 ( 原文作产业 )，把他们交在仇敌手中，使他们成为一切仇敌掳掠之物；
chapters.en: And I will forsake the remnant of mine inheritance, and deliver them into the hand of their enemies; and they shall become a prey and a spoil to all their enemies;

chapters.zh: 是因他们自从列祖出埃及直到如今，常行我眼中看为恶的事，惹动我的怒气。
chapters.en: Because they have done evil in my sight, and have provoked me to anger, since the day their fathers came forth out of Egypt, even unto this day.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，使犹大人陷在罪里，又流许多无辜人的血，充满了耶路撒冷，从这边直到那边。
chapters.en: Moreover Manasseh shed innocent blood very much, till he had filled Jerusalem from one end to another; beside his sin wherewith he made Judah to sin, in doing evil in the sight of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西其余的事，凡他所行的和他所犯的罪都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Manasseh, and all that he did, and his sin that he sinned, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 玛拿西与他列祖同睡，葬在自己宫院乌撒的园内；他儿子亚们接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Manasseh slept with his fathers, and was buried in the garden of his own house, in the garden of Uzza: and Amon his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 亚们登基的时候年二十二岁，在耶路撒冷作王二年。他母亲名叫米舒利密，是约提巴人哈鲁斯的女儿。
chapters.en: Amon twenty and two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Meshullemeth, the daughter of Haruz of Jotbah.

chapters.zh: 亚们行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，与他父亲玛拿西所行的一样；
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, as his father Manasseh did.

chapters.zh: 行他父亲一切所行的，敬奉他父亲所敬奉的偶像，
chapters.en: And he walked in all the way that his father walked in, and served the idols that his father served, and worshipped them:

chapters.zh: 离弃耶和华 ─ 他列祖的神，不遵行耶和华的道。
chapters.en: And he forsook the LORD God of his fathers, and walked not in the way of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 亚们王的臣仆背叛他，在宫里杀了他。
chapters.en: And the servants of Amon conspired against him, and slew the king in his own house.

chapters.zh: 但国民杀了那些背叛亚们王的人，立他儿子约西亚接续他作王。
chapters.en: And the people of the land slew all them that had conspired against king Amon; and the people of the land made Josiah his son king in his stead.

chapters.zh: 亚们其余所行的事都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Amon which he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 亚们葬在乌撒的园内自己的坟墓里。他儿子约西亚接续他作王。
chapters.en: And he was buried in his sepulchre in the garden of Uzza: and Josiah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 约西亚登基的时候年八岁，在耶路撒冷作王三十一年。他母亲名叫耶底大，是波斯加人亚大雅的女儿。
chapters.en: Josiah eight years old when he began to reign, and he reigned thirty and one years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Jedidah, the daughter of Adaiah of Boscath.

chapters.zh: 约西亚行耶和华眼中看为正的事，行他祖大卫一切所行的，不偏左右。
chapters.en: And he did right in the sight of the LORD, and walked in all the way of David his father, and turned not aside to the right hand or to the left.

chapters.zh: 约西亚王十八年，王差遣米书兰的孙子、亚萨利的儿子 ─ 书记沙番上耶和华殿去，吩咐他说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the eighteenth year of king Josiah, the king sent Shaphan the son of Azaliah, the son of Meshullam, the scribe, to the house of the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 你去见大祭司希勒家，使他将奉到耶和华殿的银子，就是守门的从民中收聚的银子，数算数算，
chapters.en: Go up to Hilkiah the high priest, that he may sum the silver which is brought into the house of the LORD, which the keepers of the door have gathered of the people:

chapters.zh: 交给耶和华殿里办事的人，使他们转交耶和华殿里做工的人，好修理殿的破坏之处，
chapters.en: And let them deliver it into the hand of the doers of the work, that have the oversight of the house of the LORD: and let them give it to the doers of the work which in the house of the LORD, to repair the breaches of the house,

chapters.zh: 就是转交木匠和工人，并瓦匠，又买木料和凿成的石头修理殿宇，
chapters.en: Unto carpenters, and builders, and masons, and to buy timber and hewn stone to repair the house.

chapters.zh: 将银子交在办事的人手里，不与他们算帐，因为他们办事诚实。
chapters.en: Howbeit there was no reckoning made with them of the money that was delivered into their hand, because they dealt faithfully.

chapters.zh: 大祭司希勒家对书记沙番说：我在耶和华殿里得了律法书。希勒家将书递给沙番，沙番就看了。
chapters.en: And Hilkiah the high priest said unto Shaphan the scribe, I have found the book of the law in the house of the LORD. And Hilkiah gave the book to Shaphan, and he read it.

chapters.zh: 书记沙番到王那里，回覆王说：你的仆人已将殿里的银子倒出数算，交给耶和华殿里办事的人了。
chapters.en: And Shaphan the scribe came to the king, and brought the king word again, and said, Thy servants have gathered the money that was found in the house, and have delivered it into the hand of them that do the work, that have the oversight of the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 书记沙番又对王说：祭司希勒家递给我一卷书。沙番就在王面前读那书。
chapters.en: And Shaphan the scribe shewed the king, saying, Hilkiah the priest hath delivered me a book. And Shaphan read it before the king.

chapters.zh: 王听见律法书上的话，便撕裂衣服，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the king had heard the words of the book of the law, that he rent his clothes.

chapters.zh: 吩咐祭司希勒家与沙番的儿子亚希甘、米该亚的儿子亚革波、书记沙番和王的臣仆亚撒雅，说：
chapters.en: And the king commanded Hilkiah the priest, and Ahikam the son of Shaphan, and Achbor the son of Michaiah, and Shaphan the scribe, and Asahiah a servant of the king's, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们去为我、为民、为犹大众人，以这书上的话求问耶和华；因为我们列祖没有听从这书上的言语，没有遵著书上所吩咐我们的去行，耶和华就向我们大发烈怒。
chapters.en: Go ye, enquire of the LORD for me, and for the people, and for all Judah, concerning the words of this book that is found: for great the wrath of the LORD that is kindled against us, because our fathers have not hearkened unto the words of this book, to do according unto all that which is written concerning us.

chapters.zh: 于是，祭司希勒家和亚希甘、亚革波、沙番、亚撒雅都去见女先知户勒大。户勒大是掌管礼服沙龙的妻；沙龙是哈珥哈斯的孙子、特瓦的儿子。户勒大住在耶路撒冷第二区。他们请问于他。
chapters.en: So Hilkiah the priest, and Ahikam, and Achbor, and Shaphan, and Asahiah, went unto Huldah the prophetess, the wife of Shallum the son of Tikvah, the son of Harhas, keeper of the wardrobe; (now she dwelt in Jerusalem in the college;) and they communed with her.

chapters.zh: 他对他们说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你们可以回覆那差遣你们来见我的人说，
chapters.en: And she said unto them, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Tell the man that sent you to me,

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：我必照著犹大王所读那书上的一切话，降祸与这地和其上的居民。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, Behold, I will bring evil upon this place, and upon the inhabitants thereof, all the words of the book which the king of Judah hath read:

chapters.zh: 因为他们离弃我，向别神烧香，用他们手所做的惹我发怒，所以我的忿怒必向这地发作，总不止息。
chapters.en: Because they have forsaken me, and have burned incense unto other gods, that they might provoke me to anger with all the works of their hands; therefore my wrath shall be kindled against this place, and shall not be quenched.

chapters.zh: 然而，差遣你们来求问耶和华的犹大王，你们要这样回覆他说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：至于你所听见的话，
chapters.en: But to the king of Judah which sent you to enquire of the LORD, thus shall ye say to him, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, the words which thou hast heard;

chapters.zh: 就是听见我指著这地和其上的居民所说、要使这地变为荒场、民受咒诅的话，你便心里敬服，在我面前自卑，撕裂衣服，向我哭泣，因此我应允了你。这是我 ─ 耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Because thine heart was tender, and thou hast humbled thyself before the LORD, when thou heardest what I spake against this place, and against the inhabitants thereof, that they should become a desolation and a curse, and hast rent thy clothes, and wept before me; I also have heard , saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我必使你平平安安地归到坟墓到你列祖那里；我要降与这地的一切灾祸，你也不至亲眼看见。他们就回覆王去了。
chapters.en: Behold therefore, I will gather thee unto thy fathers, and thou shalt be gathered into thy grave in peace; and thine eyes shall not see all the evil which I will bring upon this place. And they brought the king word again.

chapters.zh: 王差遣人招聚犹大和耶路撒冷的众长老来。
chapters.en: And the king sent, and they gathered unto him all the elders of Judah and of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 王和犹大众人与耶路撒冷的居民，并祭司、先知，和所有的百姓，无论大小，都一同上到耶和华的殿；王就把耶和华殿里所得的约书念给他们听。
chapters.en: And the king went up into the house of the LORD, and all the men of Judah and all the inhabitants of Jerusalem with him, and the priests, and the prophets, and all the people, both small and great: and he read in their ears all the words of the book of the covenant which was found in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 王站在柱旁，在耶和华面前立约，要尽心尽性地顺从耶和华，遵守他的诫命、法度、律例，成就这书上所记的约言。众民都服从这约。
chapters.en: And the king stood by a pillar, and made a covenant before the LORD, to walk after the LORD, and to keep his commandments and his testimonies and his statutes with all heart and all soul, to perform the words of this covenant that were written in this book. And all the people stood to the covenant.

chapters.zh: 王吩咐大祭司希勒家和副祭司，并把门的，将那为巴力和亚舍拉，并天上万象所造的器皿，都从耶和华殿里搬出来，在耶路撒冷外汲沦溪旁的田间烧了，把灰拿到伯特利去。
chapters.en: And the king commanded Hilkiah the high priest, and the priests of the second order, and the keepers of the door, to bring forth out of the temple of the LORD all the vessels that were made for Baal, and for the grove, and for all the host of heaven: and he burned them without Jerusalem in the fields of Kidron, and carried the ashes of them unto Bethel.

chapters.zh: 从前犹大列王所立拜偶像的祭司，在犹大城邑的邱坛和耶路撒冷的周围烧香，现在王都废去，又废去向巴力和日、月、行星 ( 或作十二宫 )，并天上万象烧香的人；
chapters.en: And he put down the idolatrous priests, whom the kings of Judah had ordained to burn incense in the high places in the cities of Judah, and in the places round about Jerusalem; them also that burned incense unto Baal, to the sun, and to the moon, and to the planets, and to all the host of heaven.

chapters.zh: 又从耶和华殿里将亚舍拉搬到耶路撒冷外汲沦溪边焚烧，打碎成灰，将灰撒在平民的坟上；
chapters.en: And he brought out the grove from the house of the LORD, without Jerusalem, unto the brook Kidron, and burned it at the brook Kidron, and stamped small to powder, and cast the powder thereof upon the graves of the children of the people.

chapters.zh: 又拆毁耶和华殿里娈童的屋子，就是妇女为亚舍拉织帐子的屋子，
chapters.en: And he brake down the houses of the sodomites, that by the house of the LORD, where the women wove hangings for the grove.

chapters.zh: 并且从犹大的城邑带众祭司来，污秽祭司烧香的邱坛，从迦巴直到别是巴，又拆毁城门旁的邱坛，这邱坛在邑宰约书亚门前，进城门的左边。
chapters.en: And he brought all the priests out of the cities of Judah, and defiled the high places where the priests had burned incense, from Geba to Beersheba, and brake down the high places of the gates that in the entering in of the gate of Joshua the governor of the city, which on a man's left hand at the gate of the city.

chapters.zh: 但是邱坛的祭司不登耶路撒冷耶和华的坛，只在他们弟兄中间吃无酵饼。
chapters.en: Nevertheless the priests of the high places came not up to the altar of the LORD in Jerusalem, but they did eat of the unleavened bread among their brethren.

chapters.zh: 又污秽欣嫩子谷的陀斐特，不许人在那里使儿女经火献给摩洛；
chapters.en: And he defiled Topheth, which in the valley of the children of Hinnom, that no man might make his son or his daughter to pass through the fire to Molech.

chapters.zh: 又将犹大列王在耶和华殿门旁、太监拿单米勒靠近游廊的屋子、向日头所献的马废去，且用火焚烧日车。
chapters.en: And he took away the horses that the kings of Judah had given to the sun, at the entering in of the house of the LORD, by the chamber of Nathanmelech the chamberlain, which in the suburbs, and burned the chariots of the sun with fire.

chapters.zh: 犹大列王在亚哈斯楼顶上所筑的坛和玛拿西在耶和华殿两院中所筑的坛，王都拆毁打碎了，就把灰倒在汲沦溪中。
chapters.en: And the altars that on the top of the upper chamber of Ahaz, which the kings of Judah had made, and the altars which Manasseh had made in the two courts of the house of the LORD, did the king beat down, and brake down from thence, and cast the dust of them into the brook Kidron.

chapters.zh: 从前以色列王所罗门在耶路撒冷前、邪僻山右边为西顿人可憎的神亚斯他录、摩押人可憎的神基抹、亚扪人可憎的神米勒公所筑的邱坛，王都污秽了，
chapters.en: And the high places that before Jerusalem, which on the right hand of the mount of corruption, which Solomon the king of Israel had builded for Ashtoreth the abomination of the Zidonians, and for Chemosh the abomination of the Moabites, and for Milcom the abomination of the children of Ammon, did the king defile.

chapters.zh: 又打碎柱像，砍下木偶，将人的骨头充满了那地方。
chapters.en: And he brake in pieces the images, and cut down the groves, and filled their places with the bones of men.

chapters.zh: 他将伯特利的坛，就是叫以色列人陷在罪里、尼八的儿子耶罗波安所筑的那坛，都拆毁焚烧，打碎成灰，并焚烧了亚舍拉。
chapters.en: Moreover the altar that at Bethel, the high place which Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin, had made, both that altar and the high place he brake down, and burned the high place, stamped small to powder, and burned the grove.

chapters.zh: 约西亚回头，看见山上的坟墓，就打发人将坟墓里的骸骨取出来，烧在坛上，污秽了坛，正如从前神人宣传耶和华的话。
chapters.en: And as Josiah turned himself, he spied the sepulchres that there in the mount, and sent, and took the bones out of the sepulchres, and burned upon the altar, and polluted it, according to the word of the LORD which the man of God proclaimed, who proclaimed these words.

chapters.zh: 约西亚问说：我所看见的是甚么碑？那城里的人回答说：先前有神人从犹大来，预先说王现在向伯特利坛所行的事，这就是他的墓碑。
chapters.en: Then he said, What title that that I see? And the men of the city told him, the sepulchre of the man of God, which came from Judah, and proclaimed these things that thou hast done against the altar of Bethel.

chapters.zh: 约西亚说：由他罢！不要挪移他的骸骨。他们就不动他的骸骨，也不动从撒玛利亚来那先知的骸骨。
chapters.en: And he said, Let him alone; let no man move his bones. So they let his bones alone, with the bones of the prophet that came out of Samaria.

chapters.zh: 从前以色列诸王在撒玛利亚的城邑建筑邱坛的殿，惹动耶和华的怒气，现在约西亚都废去了，就如他在伯特利所行的一般；
chapters.en: And all the houses also of the high places that in the cities of Samaria, which the kings of Israel had made to provoke to anger, Josiah took away, and did to them according to all the acts that he had done in Bethel.

chapters.zh: 又将邱坛的祭司都杀在坛上，并在坛上烧人的骨头，就回耶路撒冷去了。
chapters.en: And he slew all the priests of the high places that there upon the altars, and burned men's bones upon them, and returned to Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 王吩咐众民说：你们当照这约书上所写的，向耶和华 ─ 你们的神守逾越节。
chapters.en: And the king commanded all the people, saying, Keep the passover unto the LORD your God, as written in the book of this covenant.

chapters.zh: 自从士师治理以色列人和以色列王、犹大王的时候，直到如今，实在没有守过这样的逾越节；
chapters.en: Surely there was not holden such a passover from the days of the judges that judged Israel, nor in all the days of the kings of Israel, nor of the kings of Judah;

chapters.zh: 只有约西亚王十八年在耶路撒冷向耶和华守这逾越节。
chapters.en: But in the eighteenth year of king Josiah, this passover was holden to the LORD in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 凡犹大国和耶路撒冷所有交鬼的、行巫术的，与家中的神像和偶像，并一切可憎之物，约西亚尽都除掉，成就了祭司希勒家在耶和华殿里所得律法书上所写的话。
chapters.en: Moreover the familiar spirits, and the wizards, and the images, and the idols, and all the abominations that were spied in the land of Judah and in Jerusalem, did Josiah put away, that he might perform the words of the law which were written in the book that Hilkiah the priest found in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 在约西亚以前没有王像他尽心、尽性、尽力地归向耶和华，遵行摩西的一切律法；在他以后也没有兴起一个王像他。
chapters.en: And like unto him was there no king before him, that turned to the LORD with all his heart, and with all his soul, and with all his might, according to all the law of Moses; neither after him arose there like him.

chapters.zh: 然而，耶和华向犹大所发猛烈的怒气仍不止息，是因玛拿西诸事惹动他。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding the LORD turned not from the fierceness of his great wrath, wherewith his anger was kindled against Judah, because of all the provocations that Manasseh had provoked him withal.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必将犹大人从我面前赶出，如同赶出以色列人一般；我必弃掉我从前所选择的这城 ─ 耶路撒冷和我所说立我名的殿。
chapters.en: And the LORD said, I will remove Judah also out of my sight, as I have removed Israel, and will cast off this city Jerusalem which I have chosen, and the house of which I said, My name shall be there.

chapters.zh: 约西亚其余的事，凡他所行的都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Josiah, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 约西亚年间，埃及王法老尼哥上到伯拉河攻击亚述王；约西亚王去抵挡他。埃及王遇见约西亚在米吉多，就杀了他。
chapters.en: In his days Pharaohnechoh king of Egypt went up against the king of Assyria to the river Euphrates: and king Josiah went against him; and he slew him at Megiddo, when he had seen him.

chapters.zh: 他的臣仆用车将他的尸首从米吉多送到耶路撒冷，葬在他自己的坟墓里。国民膏约西亚的儿子约哈斯接续他父亲作王。
chapters.en: And his servants carried him in a chariot dead from Megiddo, and brought him to Jerusalem, and buried him in his own sepulchre. And the people of the land took Jehoahaz the son of Josiah, and anointed him, and made him king in his father's stead.

chapters.zh: 约哈斯登基的时候年二十三岁，在耶路撒冷作王三个月。他母亲名叫哈慕他，是立拿人耶利米的女儿。
chapters.en: Jehoahaz twenty and three years old when he began to reign; and he reigned three months in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Hamutal, the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.

chapters.zh: 约哈斯行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法他列祖一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his fathers had done.

chapters.zh: 法老尼哥将约哈斯锁禁在哈马地的利比拉，不许他在耶路撒冷作王，又罚犹大国银子一百他连得，金子一他连得。
chapters.en: And Pharaohnechoh put him in bands at Riblah in the land of Hamath, that he might not reign in Jerusalem; and put the land to a tribute of an hundred talents of silver, and a talent of gold.

chapters.zh: 法老尼哥立约西亚的儿子以利亚敬接续他父亲约西亚作王，给他改名叫约雅敬，却将约哈斯带到埃及，他就死在那里。
chapters.en: And Pharaohnechoh made Eliakim the son of Josiah king in the room of Josiah his father, and turned his name to Jehoiakim, and took Jehoahaz away: and he came to Egypt, and died there.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬将金银给法老，遵著法老的命向国民征取金银，按著各人的力量派定，索要金银，好给法老尼哥。
chapters.en: And Jehoiakim gave the silver and the gold to Pharaoh; but he taxed the land to give the money according to the commandment of Pharaoh: he exacted the silver and the gold of the people of the land, of every one according to his taxation, to give unto Pharaohnechoh.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬登基的时候年二十五岁，在耶路撒冷作王十一年。他母亲名叫西布大，是鲁玛人毗大雅的女儿。
chapters.en: Jehoiakim twenty and five years old when he began to reign; and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Zebudah, the daughter of Pedaiah of Rumah.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法他列祖一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his fathers had done.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬年间，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒上到犹大；约雅敬服事他三年，然后背叛他。
chapters.en: In his days Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up, and Jehoiakim became his servant three years: then he turned and rebelled against him.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使迦勒底军、亚兰军、摩押军，和亚扪人的军来攻击约雅敬，毁灭犹大，正如耶和华藉他仆人众先知所说的。
chapters.en: And the LORD sent against him bands of the Chaldees, and bands of the Syrians, and bands of the Moabites, and bands of the children of Ammon, and sent them against Judah to destroy it, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by his servants the prophets.

chapters.zh: 这祸临到犹大人，诚然是耶和华所命的，要将他们从自己面前赶出，是因玛拿西所犯的一切罪；
chapters.en: Surely at the commandment of the LORD came upon Judah, to remove out of his sight, for the sins of Manasseh, according to all that he did;

chapters.zh: 又因他流无辜人的血，充满了耶路撒冷；耶和华决不肯赦免。
chapters.en: And also for the innocent blood that he shed: for he filled Jerusalem with innocent blood; which the LORD would not pardon.

chapters.zh: 约雅敬其余的事，凡他所行的都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoiakim, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 约雅敬与他列祖同睡。他儿子约雅斤接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Jehoiakim slept with his fathers: and Jehoiachin his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 埃及王不再从他国中出来；因为巴比伦王将埃及王所管之地，从埃及小河直到伯拉河都夺去了。
chapters.en: And the king of Egypt came not again any more out of his land: for the king of Babylon had taken from the river of Egypt unto the river Euphrates all that pertained to the king of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 约雅斤登基的时候年十八岁，在耶路撒冷作王三个月。他母亲名叫尼护施他，是耶路撒冷人以利拿单的女儿。
chapters.en: Jehoiachin eighteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned in Jerusalem three months. And his mother's name Nehushta, the daughter of Elnathan of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 约雅斤行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法他父亲一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that his father had done.

chapters.zh: 那时，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的军兵上到耶路撒冷，围困城。
chapters.en: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up against Jerusalem, and the city was besieged.

chapters.zh: 当他军兵围困城的时候，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒就亲自来了。
chapters.en: And Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came against the city, and his servants did besiege it.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约雅斤和他母亲、臣仆、首领、太监一同出城，投降巴比伦王；巴比伦王便拿住他。那时是巴比伦王第八年。
chapters.en: And Jehoiachin the king of Judah went out to the king of Babylon, he, and his mother, and his servants, and his princes, and his officers: and the king of Babylon took him in the eighth year of his reign.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王将耶和华殿和王宫里的宝物都拿去了，将以色列王所罗门所造耶和华殿里的金器都毁坏了，正如耶和华所说的；
chapters.en: And he carried out thence all the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king's house, and cut in pieces all the vessels of gold which Solomon king of Israel had made in the temple of the LORD, as the LORD had said.

chapters.zh: 又将耶路撒冷的众民和众首领，并所有大能的勇士，共一万人，连一切木匠、铁匠都掳了去；除了国中极贫穷的人以外，没有剩下的；
chapters.en: And he carried away all Jerusalem, and all the princes, and all the mighty men of valour, ten thousand captives, and all the craftsmen and smiths: none remained, save the poorest sort of the people of the land.

chapters.zh: 并将约雅斤和王母、后妃、太监，与国中的大官，都从耶路撒冷掳到巴比伦去了；
chapters.en: And he carried away Jehoiachin to Babylon, and the king's mother, and the king's wives, and his officers, and the mighty of the land, carried he into captivity from Jerusalem to Babylon.

chapters.zh: 又将一切勇士七千人和木匠、铁匠一千人，都是能上阵的勇士，全掳到巴比伦去了。
chapters.en: And all the men of might, seven thousand, and craftsmen and smiths a thousand, all strong apt for war, even them the king of Babylon brought captive to Babylon.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王立约雅斤的叔叔玛探雅代替他作王，给玛探雅改名叫西底家。
chapters.en: And the king of Babylon made Mattaniah his father's brother king in his stead, and changed his name to Zedekiah.

chapters.zh: 西底家登基的时候年二十一岁，在耶路撒冷作王十一年。他母亲名叫哈慕他，是立拿人耶利米的女儿。
chapters.en: Zedekiah twenty and one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Hamutal, the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.

chapters.zh: 西底家行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，是照约雅敬一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that Jehoiakim had done.
